settings.label: autostart
settings.notes: Opaque var array of Autostart records. editList(), no preview. Editor is AutostartPage.qml.

settings.label: keybinds
settings.notes: Opaque var array of Keybind records. editList(), no preview — a dropped bind needs the Save+reload path. Editor is KeybindsEditor.qml / KeybindsPage.qml.

settings.label: animItems
settings.notes: ASYMMETRY: unlike every other list, this one DOES preview live via editAnim() (curves+animations apply through hyprctl eval). Per-leaf animation overrides. Nests under anim.items, not a top-level key. Editor is AnimationsPage.qml / AnimRow.qml.

settings.label: animCurves
settings.notes: User bezier curves. Previews live via editAnim(). Nests under anim.curves. Editor is AnimationsPage.qml / BezierEditor.qml.

LauncherPage.qml: Top hint line: "Changes apply to the launcher · open it with Super+Space to see them" (Theme.faint, 12px)

Backdrop live preview (id: prevFrame) - a cover-cropped Image at the launcher card aspect 560x106 (height = round(width * 106/560)), positioned by heroPosX/heroPosY and dimmed by heroStrength; hover border transitions Theme.line -> Theme.subtle. This is both a preview AND the sole editor for heroPosX/heroPosY.
Preview empty state when heroImage is "": centered "image" Icon (24px, Theme.faint) + "Shipped art" caption
"Drag to reposition" hover badge over the preview (visible only when heroImage set and hovered; black 60% pill, bottom-left, 8px margins)
Drag-to-reposition interaction on the preview (DragHandler + HoverHandler, SizeAllCursor) - writes heroPosX/heroPosY
Current backdrop filename readout (mono 11px, ElideMiddle, basename only; shows "Shipped art" in Theme.faint when unset)
"Change…" action link -> imgPicker.open()
"Use shipped art" action link -> clears heroImage (only rendered when heroImage.length > 0)

ImagePicker modal (ImagePicker.qml, z:100, dimmed 55% scrim, click-outside cancels): thumbnail GridView over a FolderListModel, starts at $HOME/Pictures, title "Choose a backdrop", folder path breadcrumb with ~ substitution, nav chips "↑ Up" / "Home" / "Pictures" / "Downloads", nameFilters *.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.bmp, folders-first sort by name, folder tiles navigate in place, image tiles pick and close, hover filename ribbon, empty state "No images or folders here", close X button, footer "Cancel". Sets imgPicker.active = false on picked/canceled.
Help text under Blur: "How much the desktop behind the palette blurs while it is open. 0 keeps it sharp."
Help text under the backdrop file row: "A landscape PNG or JPG, ideally 1600px wide or more. It is cropped to a wide banner and dimmed; drag the preview to pick the part that shows."

Bottom status bar (id: bar, 60px, tints ember at 8% fill / 40% border when dirty): status dot (Theme.ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean) + status text "Unsaved changes" / "Saved · applies to your launcher"
HubButton "Reset to defaults" (icon: refresh) -> page.resetDefaults(), always enabled; writes all 9 keys back to the mirrored defaults via edit() so it is a live preview, not an immediate commit
HubButton "Revert" (icon: close) -> page.revert(), enabled only when dirty
HubButton "Save" (icon: check, primary: true) -> page.save(), enabled only when dirty

Two-column Flickable layout (Row `cols`, spacing 56, colW = (width - spacing)/2; left column = SHAPE / BACKGROUND / HOME CARD, right column = BACKDROP) with a custom thin ScrollBar (7px wide, 4px contentItem, opacity by pressed/hovered)
SettingSection group headers themselves (mono caps + hairline rule): SHAPE, BACKGROUND, HOME CARD, BACKDROP
UpdatesPage.qml: PHASE MACHINE (structural): the page is 4 mutually-exclusive full-page views selected by `page.phase` (idle | running | prompt | done | error), plus a permanent footer. running and done SHARE one Item (visible: phase==="running" || phase==="done"). Not a setting, but the rewrite must keep all four.

UpdateStatus header (line 199-205, component /home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/UpdateStatus.qml): live readout — ember rule (opacity 0.9 when available, 0.3 when current), eyebrow flipping "UPDATE AVAILABLE"/"UP TO DATE", currentVersion -> latestVersion bump line (arrow + latest hidden unless available && latestVersion!="" && latestVersion!==currentVersion), and a meta line flipping between "N commit(s) behind  ·  checked <ago>" and "on <branch>  ·  checked <ago>".

Interval blurb Text (line 231-238): derived prose under the Segmented via intervalBlurb() — off="manual only", hourly="every hour", weekly="once a week", default(daily)="once a day". Read-only echo of the setting, not a control.

Commit list section heading (line 246-270): Text whose content flips via page.sectionLabel — "INCOMING COMMITS" when Updates.available, else "RECENT CHANGES" — followed by a hairline rule filling the remaining width.

Commit list Repeater (line 272-285) over page.sectionModel (= Updates.updates when available, else Updates.recent). Delegate UpdateRow (/home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/UpdateRow.qml): git-graph rail with a ring node, upper rail hidden on first, lower rail hidden on last, commit subject (modelData.name) elided, right-aligned "old  ->  new" (or just new when old is empty), hover-highlight rectangle. Data-driven list, NOT settings rows.
Empty-state Text (line 287-297): visible when sectionModel.length===0; "No commit details available." when Updates.available, else "You're up to date. Recent changes will appear here once loaded."
Flickable + custom ScrollBar (line 163-186): idle-only scroll container, clip, StopAtBounds, 7px-wide bar with a 4px Rectangle contentItem whose opacity steps 0.4 / 0.7 hovered / 0.9 pressed.

Running/done panel header (line 315-345): Spinner (size 16, Theme.ember, visible only while running), a ✓ checkmark Text (visible only when done), and a headline that reads "Update complete" when done, else `page.label + "…"`, else the fallback "Applying updates…".

LIVE STAGE PROGRESS BAR — Repeater (line 352-379) over page.steps: one Rectangle segment per stage, width computed to divide the row evenly with 6px gaps, height 5, radius 2.5. Colour = Theme.emberDeep when state==="failed" else Theme.ember. Opacity by state: running=1.0 (plus an infinite 0.4<->1.0 SequentialAnimation pulse, 700ms InOutSine each leg), ok=0.9, failed=1.0, skipped=0.35, default(pending)=0.18. States come from the CLI, not the UI.

LIVE LOG CONSOLE — Repeater (line 388-401) over page.logLines (the run-state log ring): mono 11px lines, elided right, last line brightened (Theme.subtle) vs the rest (Theme.faint); whole column hidden when empty.

Error panel (line 407-485): ember vertical rule sized to the text column; headline "Update failed while <label lowercased>" or plain "Update failed"; the raw errorMsg in mono (hidden when empty); and a hint that flips on whether a snapshot exists — "The system was snapshotted before the update. Roll back to undo every change." vs "Check the terminal for details, then try again."

ACTION: "Roll back" HubButton (line 469-475, icon "undo", primary, visible only when page.snapshot !== "") -> rollback(): execDetached `kitty -e sh -c 'ryoku rollback "$1"; printf ...; read -r _'` with the snapshot passed positionally, holding the terminal open, then dismiss().

ACTION: "Dismiss" HubButton (line 477-481, icon "close") -> dismiss(): execDetached shell writes literal {"phase":"idle"} over $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/ryoku-update.json, sets phase=idle, and calls Updates.check().

CONSENT PROMPT WIZARD (line 490-583): full-page question the running `ryoku update` blocks on — ember rule + promptTitle (22px) + promptDetail (13px), both streamed from the run-state JSON's `prompt` object.

BESPOKE INLINE CONTROL — the prompt option stamps (line 543-578): an anonymous Rectangle delegate (NOT HubButton) inside a Repeater over page.promptOptions. Options are arbitrary strings from the CLI, uppercased for display; width = label width + 30 for index 0 else 22; index 0 is styled as the primary ember stamp (ember border always, Font.Bold, hover fill Theme.frameBg, hover label Qt.lighter(ember,1.25)) while all others are ghosts (Theme.line border warming to ember on hover, hover fill Theme.keyTop, Font.DemiBold); own MouseArea with hoverEnabled + PointingHandCursor; colour and border.color Behaviors. Click -> answer(modelData).

ACTION: answer(choice) (line 130-133): execDetached `sh -c 'printf "%s" "$1" > "$2"'` writing the chosen string positionally to $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/ryoku-update-answer (the back-channel the CLI polls), then optimistically flips phase to "running" so the buttons clear before the CLI confirms.

Footer action bar (line 586-635): always visible, height 66, 1px top rule. Left status Text (mono 12) reads "Update running" / "Update failed" / "Update complete" by phase, else `Updates.branch + "  ·  " + Updates.currentVersion` (the version half omitted when empty).
ACTION: "Check again" HubButton (line 619-624, icon "refresh") -> Updates.check(). Idle-only (the whole footer Row is visible: phase==="idle").

ACTION: "Update now" HubButton (line 626-633, icon "download", primary, visible only when Updates.available) -> startUpdate(): execDetached `kitty -e sh -c 'RYOKU_UPDATE_UI=hub exec ryoku update'`. The real update runs in a terminal; this page only mirrors it.
FileView watcher (line 89-97) on $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/ryoku-update.json (fallback /tmp): watchChanges, atomicWrites:false, onFileChanged->reload, onLoadFailed->phase="idle". Feeds applyState().
applyState() auto-refresh edge (line 122-124): when phase transitions from non-idle back to idle it fires Updates.check() so the commit list clears itself.
WidgetsPage.qml: Widget tab switcher (Segmented, id: tabs) - model [{clock, Clock}, {weather, Weather}, {calendar, Calendar}], bound to page.group, default "clock". In-memory navigation only, never written to disk.
Header hint text next to the tabs: "Edits show on your desktop as you make them" (Theme.faint, 12px).

ClockPreview live preview card (clock tab) - 200px tall gradient Rectangle (#191320 -> #241a16, 1px Theme.line border, clipped), hosting ClockPreview bound live to design/is24/seconds/accentChoice/dateShow/dateDesign. Ticks every 1s via internal Timer; resolves accent from the Wallust singleton. Dims to opacity 0.32 when clockEnabled is false.

WeatherPreview live preview card (weather tab) - same 200px gradient shell. WeatherPreview bound to design/unit/scope/animate; cycles a representative animated sky through clear/clouds/rain/snow every 4s (Timer running: animate) with sample temps [24, 19, 15, -1]. Illustrative forecast numbers, real wallust accent. Dims to 0.32 when weatherEnabled is false.

CalendarPreview live preview card (calendar tab) - 260px tall (taller than the other two) gradient shell. CalendarPreview bound to design/accentChoice/weekStart; 30s tick Timer; sample notes are illustrative (running widget reads the shared event store). Dims to 0.32 when calEnabled is false.
LIVE PREVIEW / DISABLED status badge inside each preview card - mono 10px, letterSpacing 2, on a 40% black pill; text flips with the tab's Enabled toggle.
Calendar-tab-only explainer text under the preview: "Notes you leave on a day sync with the pill's calendar, and back."
Scrolling body: Flickable (StopAtBounds) with a bespoke inline ScrollBar (7px wide, 4px Rectangle contentItem, Theme.line, opacity 0.4/0.7/0.9 for idle/hover/press).
Tab-change crossfade: Loader swaps clockTab/weatherTab/calendarTab and a NumberAnimation (fade) runs item.opacity 0 -> 1 over Theme.medium with Theme.ease.
Bottom status bar (id: bar) - 60px Rectangle whose fill and border warm to Theme.ember at 0.08/0.4 alpha when page.dirty, with ColorAnimation transitions.
Dirty status dot (9px, Theme.ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean) + status text: "Previewing unsaved changes" / "Saved · live on your desktop".

HubButton "Reset to defaults" (icon: refresh) - always enabled; calls resetDefaults(), which pushes every key's default through edit() so it writes live but leaves the page dirty (a preview, not a commit).
HubButton "Revert" (icon: close) - enabled only when dirty; stops the throttle, restores committedVals into the draft and flushes to disk.
HubButton "Save" (icon: check, primary) - enabled only when dirty; stops the throttle, flushes, then snapshots the draft as the new committed baseline.

Two-column layout inside every tab: Row with spacing 56 and colW = (width - spacing) / 2; left column WIDGET/FORMAT/DATE (clock), WIDGET/READOUT (weather), WIDGET/WEEK (calendar); right column SIZE & SHAPE + PLACEMENT on all three.

Implicit persistence machinery (no visible control): FileView on ~/.config/ryoku/widgets.json with blockLoading, watchChanges, atomicWrites, printErrors false; JsonAdapter mirroring all 40 keys; 70ms throttle Timer with trailing write; Component.onDestruction revert-on-leave.
WindowRulesPage.qml: "Add rule" HubButton - top-right, icon "plus", label "Add rule". Calls page.addRule(), which pushes {class:"", title:"", action:"float", value:""} onto a fresh array copy. Always enabled.

Intro Text - anchored between page left and addBtn.left (rightMargin 18), vertically centred on the Add button, Theme.subtle / Theme.font / 13px / Font.Medium, WordWrap: "Custom window rules layered over the ones Ryoku ships. Match a window by its class and/or title, then pick what to do: float a dialog, pin a video, force it opaque, and more. Changes apply when you Save."
Empty-state Text - visible only when store.windowRules.length === 0, topPadding 28, horizontally centred, Theme.faint / 13px: "No custom rules yet. Add one to override how a specific window opens."
Flickable scroll region (id flick) with contentHeight = Math.max(col.height, height), clip, StopAtBounds, hosting a Column (spacing 12, width flick.width - 12).
Custom vertical ScrollBar - policy AsNeeded, width 7, contentItem Rectangle implicitWidth 4, Theme.line, opacity 0.9 pressed / 0.7 hovered / 0.4 idle with a NumberAnimation Behavior (Theme.quick).

Per-row delete button (id delBtn) - 30x30 Item with a trash Icon (size 17). Tint animates Theme.dim -> Theme.bad on hover; backing Rectangle fades to Theme.bad at 12% alpha. HoverHandler sets PointingHandCursor; TapHandler calls page.removeRule(index). No confirmation.

Action bar (id bar) - 60px Rectangle pinned to the page bottom (bottomMargin 8), 'mirrors Shell Settings'. Background and border animate on store.dirty: Theme.ember at 8% fill / 40% border when dirty, else Theme.surfaceLo / Theme.line (ColorAnimation, Theme.medium).
Status dot (id statusDot) - 9x9 circle, Theme.ember when dirty else Theme.ok, ColorAnimation Theme.quick.
Status text - "Unsaved changes" when store.dirty, else "Saved · applies on save" (renders as 'Saved · applies on save'). Colour Theme.bright / Theme.dim, Font.DemiBold.
"Clear all" HubButton - icon "trash", enabled only when store.windowRules.length > 0. Calls store.editList("windowRules", []) directly (bypasses the page's helper functions). No confirmation dialog.
"Revert" HubButton - icon "close", enabled only when store.dirty. Calls store.revert(), which re-adopts the committed doc AND shells out to `ryoku-hub hypr restore` to reload the live session.

"Save" HubButton - icon "check", primary: true, enabled only when store.dirty. Calls store.save(), which shells out to `ryoku-hub hypr save <full JSON snapshot>` and regenerates settings.lua + reloads Hyprland.

Dropdown popup surface (from Dropdown.qml) - Popup right-aligned under the field, width max(fieldWidth, 200), height min(contentHeight + 12, 300), fade enter/exit transitions, Theme.surface background with Theme.line border, ScrollBar-equipped ListView of 32px rows; active option renders in Theme.ember/DemiBold, hover fills Theme.keyTop. Chevron Icon rotates 180 degrees when open.
Focus/hover affordances on all three text fields - border colour animates to Theme.ember on activeFocus (ColorAnimation, Theme.quick).
Placeholder Text overlays inside each TextInput ("Match class", "Match title", and the action-dependent value hint) - these are decoration, not stored values.
HyprStore instance (id store) - non-visual engine mounted by this page; spawns `ryoku-hub hypr defaults` and `ryoku-hub hypr get` on load and exposes ready/dirty/committed/defaults.

Adjacent chrome hosted by Hub.qml, not this file: the page header (title "Window Rules", subtitle "Float, size, pin, or place windows by class or title.") and the ConfigViewer showing the shipped Lua source (Hub.qml:180 -> luaSec([mod + "window_rules.lua"])).
AppOverridesPage.qml: Intro explainer paragraph (id: intro) — long-form prose anchored between parent.left and pickWin.left/addBtn.left, Theme.subtle, 13px Medium: "Give one app its own look, layered on top of the global Appearance... Example: make a browser fully opaque, or a terminal square-cornered."

"Add app" HubButton (id: addBtn, icon "plus", top-right) → page.addApp("") appends a record seeded with {class:"", title:"", opacity:-1, rounding:-1, borderSize:-1, blur:"inherit", shadow:"inherit", dim:"inherit", anim:"inherit", opaque:"inherit"}. This literal seed IS the per-record default contract.

"Add from open window…" Dropdown (id: pickWin, width/fieldWidth 220, left of addBtn) — a fire-once ACTION menu masquerading as a select: `current: ""` is hardcoded and never updates, onChosen calls page.addApp(k). `visible: page.openClasses.length > 0` so it disappears entirely when no windows are open.

Live open-window class discovery: Process `clientsProc` runs ["hyprctl", "clients", "-j"], StdioCollector parses JSON, dedupes non-empty `class` values into a sorted array → page.openClasses. Wrapped in try/catch that swallows all errors. refreshOpenClasses() toggles running false→true; fired once on Component.onCompleted. Never re-polled — the list goes stale as windows open/close.

Empty-state placeholder Text — `visible: store.appOverrides.length === 0`, centered, topPadding 28, Theme.faint: "No app overrides yet. Click “Add app”, or pick one from an open window, to give it its own opacity, corners, blur, and more."

Repeater over store.appOverrides with a per-record card chrome: Rectangle, Theme.surfaceLo, radius Theme.radius, 1px Theme.line border, height = cardCol.implicitHeight + 28. Unbounded count, user-created.

Per-card delete control — 30x30 hit target, right-anchored in the match row: "trash" Icon (size 17) that tints Theme.dim→Theme.bad on hover, over a Rectangle that fades to 12%-alpha Theme.bad on hover; HoverHandler (PointingHandCursor) + TapHandler → page.removeApp(index). No confirmation.

"LOOK" eyebrow heading (Theme.mono, 10px, DemiBold, letterSpacing 2) + helper paragraph: "Inherit follows the global Appearance. Switch to Custom to set this app's own value." — hand-rolled, NOT a SettingSection.

"EFFECTS" eyebrow heading (same mono/10px/letterSpacing-2 treatment) + helper paragraph: "Inherit follows the global. Off forces the effect off for this app. Force opaque removes transparency entirely (overrides Opacity)."
Horizontal divider Rectangle (1px Theme.line) separating the match row from the LOOK block.

Action bar (id: bar, 60px, bottom-anchored, mirrors Window Rules) — background AND border animate between Theme.surfaceLo/Theme.line and 8%/40%-alpha Theme.ember driven by store.dirty, via ColorAnimation Behaviors at Theme.medium.
Dirty status indicator: 9px status dot (Theme.ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean) + text toggling between "Unsaved changes" (Theme.bright) and "Saved · applies on save" (Theme.dim).
"Clear all" HubButton (icon "trash", `enabled: store.appOverrides.length > 0`) → store.editList("appOverrides", []) — wipes every record with no confirmation and no undo beyond Revert.
"Revert" HubButton (icon "close", `enabled: store.dirty`) → store.revert() — re-adopts the committed doc AND shells out to `ryoku-hub hypr restore` for a full compositor reload.

"Save" HubButton (icon "check", primary: true, `enabled: store.dirty`) → store.save() → `ryoku-hub hypr save <json>`; regenerates settings.lua and reloads. This is the ONLY path by which anything on this page takes effect.

Flickable (id: flick) with contentHeight Math.max(col.height, height), clip, StopAtBounds, plus a bespoke 7px-wide QQC.ScrollBar whose contentItem is a Theme.line Rectangle with three-stage opacity (0.4 idle / 0.7 hovered / 0.9 pressed) and a NumberAnimation Behavior.
Inline `component MatchField` — bespoke bordered TextInput (30px, ember focus border, selectByMouse, clip) with its own manual placeholder Text overlay shown only when `text === "" && !activeFocus`.
Inline `component OvNum` — bespoke Inherit/Custom + conditional Slider + percent-or-toFixed readout composite (36px). Reusable but private to this file.
Inline `component OvChoice` — bespoke label + right-anchored Segmented composite (34px). Private to this file.
HyprStore instance (id: store) — the shared draft engine backing every Lua-editing page; this page only ever touches its `appOverrides` list, `dirty`, `editList()`, `save()`, `revert()`.
DictationPage.qml: ShowcaseBackdrop { anchors.fill: parent } — the page's backdrop layer, behind both shells.

TWO mutually exclusive shells, not tabs: (a) the install empty-state Column, visible: page.loaded && !page.installed, centered, width Math.min(parent.width*0.6, 460), spacing 16; (b) the settings Flickable, visible: !page.loaded || page.installed. Note (b) is visible BEFORE load completes, so the settings shell shows first and the install prompt only appears after the probe returns.

Install empty-state copy (3 stacked Texts, all centered, word-wrapped): headline "Voxtype isn't installed" (Theme.bright, 16, DemiBold); body "Voice dictation needs the voxtype-bin package. GlazePKG opens a terminal to confirm the install, and this page fills in once it finishes." (Theme.subtle, 13); footnote "About 600 MB for the engine and runtimes, before any model." (Theme.faint, Theme.mono, 11, DemiBold).

One-shot notice banner (page.notice): tap-to-dismiss MouseArea with PointingHandCursor, ember-tinted Rectangle (fill ember @ 0.10 alpha, border ember @ 0.35), Theme.cream text, height = implicitHeight + 20. Only message set today: "Model downloaded. If dictation doesn't respond, a reboot may be needed to apply it." Cleared by download() and by tapping.

Error banner (page.busyError): pinned at the BOTTOM of the column, Theme.bad-tinted Rectangle (fill bad @ 0.10, border bad @ 0.4), Theme.bad text, NOT dismissible — only cleared by the next apply()/download()/removeModel(). Text is raw scraped stderr from ryoku-hub, or the synthetic "Download failed (voxtype exited <code>)."

Engine/model card gallery: Repeater in a Column spacing 10 inside the ENGINE & MODEL SettingSection. Each card is an inline Rectangle delegate with required property var modelData, height cardCol.height + 24, three-state color (active/hover/idle) and border, both with ColorAnimation Theme.quick.

Per-card trailing action Item (id: action, 26x26, right-anchored, rightMargin 12) — a bespoke tri-state affordance: Spinner (size 18) while busy, else Icon "trash"/"download" with hover-dependent tint and an animated tint Behavior. Distinct from the card's own tap-to-select.

Live status readouts inside each card: the mono meta line (provider · size · downloading…/downloaded/not downloaded) whose color flips to Theme.ember for busy or missing models, and the wrapped detail description.

State-dependent helper prose under the Voice typing toggle (3 variants, color flips dim <-> ember) and under the API KEY section (2 variants, color flips ok <-> subtle). These are computed banners, not static labels.
Flickable scroll container: contentWidth: width, contentHeight: col.height + 40, clip, boundsBehavior StopAtBounds, anchors.leftMargin 4; inner Column width Math.min(parent.width - 8, 620).

Four Process host objects (getProc/setProc/dlProc/rmProc) — the page's whole data plane: `ryoku-hub voxtype get|set <json>|download <key>|rmmodel <key>`, with StdioCollector stdout/stderr parsing and JSON.parse of the get snapshot (failure only console.log'd, page silently stays unloaded).
Two detached kitty terminal handoffs (installVoxtype / removeVoxtype) via Quickshell.execDetached — external interactive flows the page cannot observe.

Window-focus reconciler: readonly property bool windowActive: Window.active + onWindowActiveChanged -> reload(), so the page re-probes whenever the Hub regains focus (this is how it flips out of the install prompt after the gpk terminal closes). Plus Component.onCompleted -> reload().
readonly property bool previewDirty: false — the page's contract with the Hub shell: this page is never dirty, everything applies instantly.
PluginsPage.qml: Refresh button (PluginsPage.qml:136-159): 32x32 ghost square, ember hairline on hover, "refresh" icon that spins (RotationAnimation, 0->360, 800ms, infinite) while page.refreshing. Tap sets refreshing = true then re-runs loadCatalog() + refresh(). `visible: view !== "detail" && !storeMode` — hidden in the shipped Store host, which supplies its own refresh button (StorePage.qml:29-49) driving pluginsPage.refreshing/loadCatalog()/refresh() from outside. Those three are a public API of the page and must survive.

Discover | Installed segmented tab row (PluginsPage.qml:162-205): Repeater over the literal [{k:"discover",l:"Discover"},{k:"installed",l:"Installed"}]. `visible: view !== "detail" && !storeMode`. Not a persisted setting — pure view state.

Installed-count badge (PluginsPage.qml:193-199): pill on the Installed tab, `visible: k === "installed" && plugins.length > 0`, mono text = page.plugins.length, ember when the tab is selected. Read-only readout.

Discover store grid (PluginsPage.qml:208-240): Flickable + Flow, spacing 18, topPadding 48 (or 4 in storeMode), 3-up responsive cards at `Math.max(300, (grid.width - 36) / 3)`, contentHeight = grid.implicitHeight + 56, clipped. Repeater over page.catalog -> PluginStoreCard, onOpened pushes detailPlugin + view = "detail".

PluginStoreCard tile (PluginStoreCard.qml): 320x286 store tile — 168px live preview Image (PreserveAspectCrop, sourceSize 720, slow 1.05 zoom on hover), gradient placeholder with the manifest icon behind it, bottom scrim, Official/Community badge (verified/users icon), green installed tick, 力 brand mark + name over the scrim, 2-line elided tagline, host chips, drop shadow + 1.012 lift on hover, whole tile is a TapHandler.
Discover empty state (PluginsPage.qml:233-239): "sparkles" icon + "The plugin catalogue is loading, or unreachable.", `visible: catalog.length === 0`.

PluginStoreDetail showcase (PluginStoreDetail.qml): full-page featured detail. Three stacked Canvas layers — ambient radial glow blooms (screen composite: warm brand 0.11, cream 0.05, deep ember 0.05), a 34px faint spec grid, and an edge vignette — plus four Repeater-drawn corner ticks. Hero preview left (min(w*0.56, 620), sourceSize 1400, MultiEffect shadow, icon placeholder), dossier right (brand mark, Official/Community badge, name at 34px, tagline, "by <author>", description, "PLACES WHERE IT LIVES" host chips with window/widgets icons).

Screenshot gallery / strip (PluginStoreDetail.qml:212-240): 128x82 thumbs, `visible: shots.length > 1`, selected thumb gets a 2px ember border; TapHandler sets detail.shotIndex, which swaps the hero. `shots` is derived — preview first, then screenshots minus any duplicate of preview. Transient view state, not persisted.

INSTALL / INSTALLED / WORKING action stamp (PluginStoreDetail.qml:309-342): mono, uppercase, letterSpacing 2, ember hairline; disabled when already installed or busy. Runs `ryoku-hub extras plugin <id>`, then clears busyId and refreshes.

REMOVE action stamp (PluginStoreDetail.qml:345-372): ghost stamp, hairline warms to Theme.bad on hover, `visible: installed && !busy`. Runs page.removePlugin(): disables first (`ryoku-plugins-place <id> enabled false`) then `ryoku-hub extras pluginremove <id>` — deliberately symlink-safe because a dev plugin is a symlink into the checkout and rm -rf would gut the repo.
Back-to-Store button (PluginStoreDetail.qml:131-152): rotated chevron + "Store", pops view back to "discover".

UPDATE <version> / UPDATING stamp per installed card (PluginsPage.qml:356-388): ember-hairline stamp, `visible: page.updateFor(modelData) !== ""`, i.e. only when semver(catalog.version) > semver(manifest.version). Click reinstalls via page.install(id); disabled while any busyId is set. Depends on page.cmpSemver() (dot-split, missing parts = 0) and page.updateFor() — derived readouts, not settings.

Installed cards list (PluginsPage.qml:255-459): Flickable + Column, topPadding 48, spacing 16, contentHeight = col.implicitHeight + 40. Repeater over page.plugins (whatever `discover.sh --all` emits). Each card: hairline that warms to ember on hover, plugin name (manifest.name || id) at 18px, and a description line suffixed "  ·  OFFICIAL" when manifest.official, elided to a width that shrinks by 90px when an Update stamp is present.
Installed empty state (PluginsPage.qml:267-285): 120px hairline box, "No plugins installed yet. Open Discover to browse and install."

PluginPlacementEditor drag-arrange canvas (PluginPlacementEditor.qml, implicitHeight 230): a ~16:10 screen-proportioned stage (dark #191320 -> #241a16 gradient, inset frame at 0.06 white, "LIVE PLACEMENT" mono eyebrow), a dashed Canvas-stroked "reserved" band showing the third of each edge the shell pre-reserves (top = island, left = mixer, right = power menu, bottom = clear for symmetry), and a draggable "popout" body chip (64x96 vertical / 96x60 horizontal) docked to the live edge. Preview only — the persisted outputs are edge + align.

Desktop-widget hint text (PluginsPage.qml:446-454): qsTr("Drag the widget on the desktop to place it; right-click it for its menu."), `visible: card.on && card.host === "desktopWidget"`. The ONLY qsTr() on the page. Marks a deliberate hole: desktopWidget x/y/scale/locked are never editable here — they're committed by dragging on the wallpaper.

Backend processes, all four of which are the page's real data plane: listProc `bash <script> --all` (script = $RYOKU_SHELL_DIR/quickshell/plugins/discover.sh, falling back to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/quickshell/plugins/discover.sh) -> page.plugins; catProc `ryoku-hub extras plugincatalog` -> page.catalog; installProc `ryoku-hub extras plugin <id>`; rmProc `ryoku-hub extras pluginremove <id>`; placeProc `ryoku-plugins-place ...` which refreshes the list onExited. All JSON.parse is try/catch'd to [] so one bad write never blanks the page.

Hardcoded offline catalogue fallback (PluginsPage.qml:107-120): when plugincatalog returns an empty list, the page synthesizes a full wallhaven entry — id/name/official/author/tagline/a two-sentence description/icon "wallpaper"/hosts [framePopout, desktopWidget]/preview + two screenshots resolved from $XDG_DATA_HOME/ryoku/plugins/wallhaven/assets/ — so the store is never empty offline. This literal is product content and must be carried across verbatim.
GpuPage.qml: GpuCard hero (id: hero) — a bespoke read-only 'trading card' of the machine's graphics, anchored top-left, cardWidth: Math.min(parent.width * 0.4, 380). Fed `caps: page.caps` and `failed: page.capsError !== ""`. Contains: '力  GRAPHICS' eyebrow; a 'RENDERS ON' hero name (falls back to 'Unavailable' when failed, 'Detecting…' otherwise) with a circular VRAM badge (rounded GB); an INVENTORY badge + hairline + LAPTOP/DESKTOP · CPU type line; a dossier box with two inline GpuRow entries (tag chips 'iGPU' = caps.host and 'dGPU' = caps.passthrough, each showing model, '<vramMb> MB · <driver>', and a DISPLAY/FREE role marker + dot); a 'MUX <IGPU|DGPU|UNKNOWN>' line (hidden when mux is undefined or 'none'); and a WaveMeter signature at opacity 0.35.

GpuCard's live visual behaviour: Canvas holographic wash (3 radial tints, screen composite), a cursor-following Canvas foil sheen, parallax tilt (±6°, two Rotation transforms driven by a hover MouseArea with acceptedButtons: Qt.NoButton), hoverPct OutBack scale pop, and a 320ms OutQuart intro animation. None of this is expressible as settings.
ShowcaseBackdrop filling the whole page (decorative backdrop layer).

Two-column page layout: fixed hero rail on the left, a scrolling Flickable (id: gfx) of SettingSections on the right (anchors.left: hero.right + 40 margin, contentWidth: width, contentHeight: gfxCol.height, clip, StopAtBounds). Section column width is gfx.width - 8, spacing 22.

Caps-probe failure column — replaces nothing but appears under the hero when page.capsError !== "": a Theme.bad DemiBold 14px 'Couldn't read your graphics hardware.' headline, the raw stderr/exit message in mono 11px Theme.subtle, and the Retry HubButton.

Plan console — the `--dry-run` output viewer: a 220px-tall Theme.surfaceLo rectangle (Theme.radius, 1px Theme.line border, clip) wrapping a Flickable with 12px margins showing page.planText as mono 11px Theme.cream with wrapMode WrapAnywhere. Visible only when page.planning. This is raw CLI text (package list, 'write /etc/...' lines, AUR build notices), not structured data.

Enable-in-progress notice — Theme.dim 12px text visible when page.enabling: 'Setting up in a terminal window (it builds a kernel module, so it can take a few minutes). Click Recheck when it finishes.'

Mode-warning banner — visible when page.modeWarn !== "": ember-tinted rectangle (10% fill, 40% border), height modeWarnText.implicitHeight + 20, holding raw stderr from `gpu mode set` (e.g. the long BIOS/MUX refusal). Never auto-dismisses; only cleared by the next setMode/reload.

Action error banner — bottom-anchored full-width rectangle visible when page.actionError !== "": Theme.bad at 12% fill / 50% border, height Math.min(errText.implicitHeight + 22, 110), text elided at maximumLineCount 5, DISMISSED BY TAPPING THE BANNER ITSELF (TapHandler sets actionError = "") — there is no close button.
The readiness-checks disclosure animation container (clipped height/opacity Behaviors) and the CheckRow inline component itself — bespoke row rendering, listed above as a readout.

Background machinery with no visual surface: five Processes (capsProc `ryoku-hub gpu caps` with exit-code-based error handling and JSON.parse fallback, modeProc `gpu mode get`, modeSetProc, runProc, planProc), a Component.onCompleted -> page.reload(), and a 4000ms repeating Timer that re-polls capsProc while page.enabling is true so the page advances on its own when the terminal build finishes.

Six action buttons (Retry, Review changes, Enable passthrough, Close, Recheck, Disable passthrough) — enumerated in `settings` as kind: "action" so their commands/visibility rules are contractually captured, but they are actions, not settings.
Page-level contract: `readonly property bool previewDirty: false` — GpuPage declares itself as never having unsaved preview state, which the Hub chrome reads.

Hub chrome (outside this file, but bound to the page): Hub.qml routes key "gpu" to gpuComp, and its ConfigViewer exposes { edit: [], view: [~/.config/hypr/gpu.lua], viewTip: "Read-only. GPU config written by ryoku-gpu; regenerated on GPU or driver changes." } — gpu.lua is deliberately NOT user-editable from the Hub.
AddonsPage.qml: ShowcaseBackdrop — decorative animated backdrop, only rendered in the grid view (visible: page.view === "grid")

Bento card gallery — Flickable + Flow + Repeater over page.plugins; 3-up responsive cards, min width 280, fixed height 248, gradient fill, MultiEffect drop shadow, hover lift (scale 1.012) and ember border on hover
Per-card preview image — Image loaded from file://<plugin dir>/assets/preview-widget.png, PreserveAspectCrop, async, sourceSize.width 640
Per-card preview fallback — Icon named from manifest.defaults.icon, falling back to the "widgets" glyph, shown when the preview asset fails to load
Per-card ON/OFF status pip — read-only mono badge in the preview's top-right, green-tinted when enabled; reflects placement.enabled but is NOT clickable (enabling only happens in detail)
Per-card metadata line — host name + "N settings" count derived from manifest.metadata.settings.length
Card tap target — TapHandler that sets page.sel and switches page.view to "detail" (navigation, not a setting)
Empty state — centered "widgets" icon + "No add-ons installed. Open the Store to browse and install." shown when page.plugins.length === 0
Detail back affordance — chevron + plugin name + version chip; the whole header Item is a TapHandler that returns to the grid
Version readout — "v<manifest.version>", read-only, hidden when absent

UPDATE button — action; visible only when page.updateFor(sel) !== "" (catalogue semver > installed semver); label flips to "UPDATING" and opacity drops to 0.6 while page.busyId === sel.id; runs `ryoku-hub extras plugin <id>`, then refreshes both the installed list and the catalogue

REMOVE button — destructive action with NO confirmation dialog; fires `ryoku-plugins-place <id> forget` (drops the whole plugins.json entry) AND `ryoku-hub extras pluginremove <id>`, then snaps view back to the grid

Desktop-widget hint text — conditional prose ("Desktop widgets are moved, resized and hidden on the wallpaper - drag the tile, or right-click it for its menu."), shown only when placement.host === "desktopWidget"
"This add-on has no configurable settings." placeholder — shown when the plugin's schema is empty
PluginSettingsForm group headers — mono-caps label + hairline rule, generated per distinct `group` in the plugin schema (a rendering surface, not a setting)
Image-field system file chooser — QtQuick.Dialogs FileDialog titled "Choose an image", nameFilters ["Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp *.gif *.bmp)", "All files (*)"], routed through the XDG portal

Six background Processes — listProc (`bash <shellDir>/quickshell/plugins/discover.sh --all`), catProc (`ryoku-hub extras plugincatalog`), placeProc, settingsProc, rmProc, installProc — every one refreshes page state on exit
Script path resolution — RYOKU_SHELL_DIR, else XDG_CONFIG_HOME/HOME fallback to ~/.config/quickshell/plugins/discover.sh
FastfetchPage.qml: READOUT PREVIEW panel (left, width = 46% of the split, radius Theme.radius, bg #0e0b07 hardcoded, 1px Theme.line border): eyebrow label "READOUT PREVIEW" (mono, 10px, letterSpacing 2.4, AllUppercase).

Live readout render: a Flickable (StopAtBounds, AsNeeded 6px vertical ScrollBar) holding a Row of [emblem tile | Column of parsed lines]. Nested Repeaters render page.previewLines as per-run Text in Theme.mono 12px, PlainText, weight Bold when the run is bold. Mono font is load-bearing for column alignment.

Emblem preview tile (92px wide Item, min height 92): an 84x84 Image (PreserveAspectFit, sourceSize 168x168, smooth) when kind==image && source non-empty, with a file:// prefix re-added if missing; otherwise an 84x84 placeholder Rectangle (Theme.surfaceLo, Theme.line border) showing "TXT" for ascii, the Nerd Font glyph  at 30px for builtin, or "none" at 12px.

Live preview pipeline (invisible but load-bearing): page.queuePreview/previewNow spawn `ryoku-hub fastfetch preview <full model JSON>` on every edit, throttled by a 90ms Timer with a previewPending latch that restarts the throttle. The backend builds a temp config.jsonc and runs `fastfetch --config <tmp> --logo none --pipe false`.

page.parseAnsi(): bespoke SGR parser turning fastfetch truecolor output into lines of {text,color,bold} runs. Handles ONLY 38;2;r;g;b, 1 (bold) and 0/empty (reset to Theme.cream). Everything else in an escape sequence is silently dropped.

"Preview in terminal" HubButton (icon "terminal", bottom-left of the preview card) -> Quickshell.execDetached(["kitty","-e","sh","-c","ryoku-fastfetch; read -n1"]). The only way to see logo width/height/padding and the real emblem.
Hint Text "kitty shows the real logo" (bottom-right of the preview card, visible only when kind==image).
pvRule hairline (Theme.lineSoft) + pvBar (52px) footer inside the preview card.
"Open file" HubButton (icon "terminal", EMBLEM group) -> Quickshell.execDetached(["kitty","-e","nvim",<logo.source>]); enabled only when source is non-empty; no-ops on an empty source.
"Choose image" / "Choose .txt" HubButton (icon "image") + the two FileDialogs (imageDlg titled "Choose a logo image", asciiDlg titled "Choose an ASCII art file") with their nameFilters.

Explainer Text under the EMBLEM group (max width 560, WordWrap, visible only when kind==image): "PNG, JPG or WEBP; an SVG is rasterized to PNG on import. Square art reads best; it is drawn with the kitty graphics protocol in kitty, chafa elsewhere."
Controls column: a Flickable (ctrlFlick, width = split minus preview minus 28 spacing, StopAtBounds, AsNeeded 7px ScrollBar) over a 26-spacing Column of three SettingSections (EMBLEM, ACCENT, INFO).
Bottom action bar (54px, Theme.rail, Theme.line border): a 9px status dot (Theme.gold when dirty, Theme.ok when clean) + status Text ("Unsaved changes" / "Saved · config.jsonc").
"Revert" HubButton (icon "close", enabled only when dirty) -> page.revert(): stops the throttle, restores page.committed, re-previews.
"Save" HubButton (primary, icon "check", enabled only when dirty) -> page.save(): stops the throttle and runs `ryoku-hub fastfetch save <model JSON>`; the backend atomically writes config.jsonc.
Per-row tool cluster inside each INFO row: ↑ ↓ move buttons (left), ●/○ enable and ✕ remove (right), plus a row-wide HoverHandler tinting the row Theme.surfaceLo.

Inline `component RowMoveBtn: Item` (lines 650-671): bespoke 22x22 glyph button with a hover Rectangle (Theme.keyTop), configurable glyph + tint, HoverHandler with PointingHandCursor and a TapHandler emitting tapped(). Used 4x per INFO row. Must survive as a component or be re-created.
Load path: a Process running `ryoku-hub fastfetch get` at page construction (running:true), parsing stdout into both model and committed; failures only console.log.

Hub-level page header (defined in Hub.qml, not this file, but visually part of the page): title "Fastfetch", the subtitle string, and an "Edit config.jsonc" button that opens ~/.config/fastfetch/config.jsonc raw with tip "Opens the fastfetch readout config (config.jsonc) directly. Yours; the Hub writes your changes here too."
Component.onDestruction: stops the throttle only — leaving the page silently discards unsaved edits with no prompt.
CreditsPage.qml: NO SETTINGS ON THIS PAGE. CreditsPage.qml is a pure showcase/host page — it contains no SettingSection, no ToggleRow/SliderRow/NumberField/ChoiceRow/Dropdown/ColorField/SettingField/Segmented, no config keys, no defaults object, no QtObject draft, and writes nothing to disk. Everything below is content or chrome that must survive a rewrite verbatim.
ShowcaseBackdrop { anchors.fill: parent } — full-page backdrop singleton, Profile-page twin.

Three Graces art: Image id 'graces', source 'art/three-graces.png', PreserveAspectFit, smooth, asynchronous, opacity 0.5, height = parent.height, width = height (square box), anchored right with rightMargin -parent.width*0.02 (deliberate bleed off-canvas), verticalCenter. layer.enabled with MultiEffect { brightness: -0.14; saturation: -0.32 }. The left-edge dissolve is BAKED INTO THE PNG ALPHA (a horizontal ramp) — there is no fade Rectangle and must never be one.

Scrollable left column: Flickable id 'flick', width = page.leftW where leftW = Math.min(page.width * 0.60, page.width - 430); anchors left/top/bottom, leftMargin 18, topMargin 6, bottomMargin 12; clip: true; boundsBehavior StopAtBounds; flickableDirection VerticalFlick; contentHeight bound to col.implicitHeight. Column id 'col' spacing 26.
Hero block (spacing 12): Eyebrow { text: "Kansha · Gratitude" }.

Hero bilingual title Row (spacing 16): Text "感謝" (感謝) — Theme.bright, Theme.fontJp, pixelSize 56, weight Font.Black, bottom-aligned; Text "Gratitude" — Theme.sun, Theme.display, pixelSize 40, weight Font.Medium, italic, bottom-aligned with bottomMargin 6.

Hero body paragraph (width Math.min(parent.width, 500), Theme.subtle, Theme.font, pixelSize 13, lineHeight 1.4, WordWrap): "Ryoku stands on the work of others. These projects, communities, and people lent code, ideas, and a sharp eye. Like the Three Graces who give, receive, and return, we pass the thanks on."
Section: SectionHead { text: "Standing on the shoulders" } — brand-dot + mono uppercase kicker + hairline.

Projects gallery: Grid id 'projGrid', columns 2, columnSpacing 34, rowSpacing 0, cellW = (width - columnSpacing) / 2; Repeater over page.projects → CreditLine delegate (width projGrid.cellW; name/by/role/url bound from modelData).
