Section: SectionHead { text: "Alpha · Beta — the bug hunters" } ("Alpha · Beta — the bug hunters").
Testers band: Flow (width parent.width, spacing 10); Repeater over page.testers → TesterChip delegate (handle/url from modelData).

TESTERS DATA (readonly property var testers — 5 entries, exact, order matters): 1. bhimio1 → https://github.com/bhimio1; 2. povargg → https://github.com/povargg; 3. godspeed1709 → https://github.com/godspeed1709; 4. VortexVirus → https://github.com/VortexVirus; 5. Lowingx → https://github.com/Lowingx. All 5 are linked; all render the static role label "BUG HUNTER".

Footer seal Row (spacing 8): Text "力" (力) — Theme.sun, Theme.fontJp, pixelSize 12, Font.Bold, opacity 0.9; Text "Built in the open, with kansha." — Theme.faint, Theme.mono, pixelSize 10, letterSpacing 1.5. Trailing spacer Item { width: 1; height: 2 }.

ACTION: openUrl(u) — no-ops on empty/zero-length url; otherwise sets opener.command = ["xdg-open", u] and opener.running = true. Single shared Process { id: opener }. This is the page's only side effect: it launches the system browser/handler.
ACTION: every linked CreditLine row is a click target (TapHandler onTapped → page.openUrl(cl.url), enabled only when linked).
ACTION: every TesterChip is a click target (TapHandler onTapped → page.openUrl(tc.url), unconditionally enabled — guarded only inside openUrl).

INLINE COMPONENT: SectionHead (Column, spacing 10) — property string text; Row(spacing 8) of a 5x5 Rectangle radius Theme.radius color Theme.brand (the single vermillion dot) + Text (Theme.faint, Theme.mono, pixelSize 10, Font.DemiBold, letterSpacing 2.4, Font.AllUppercase); then a full-width 1px Theme.line hairline.

INLINE COMPONENT: CreditLine (Item, height 52) — props name/by/role/url; readonly linked = url.length > 0. HoverHandler id 'hov' enabled only when linked, cursorShape PointingHandCursor. Column: name Text (Theme.font, pixelSize 14, Font.DemiBold, color hov.hovered ? Theme.bright : Theme.cream, ColorAnimation Theme.quick) + right-anchored "↗" (↗) Text visible only when linked (Theme.font, pixelSize 13, color hov.hovered ? Theme.ember : Theme.faint, animated); meta Text = role.toUpperCase() + "  ·  " + by (Theme.dim, Theme.mono, pixelSize 9, letterSpacing 1.2, ElideRight). Bottom hairline 1px, color hov.hovered ? Theme.line : Theme.lineSoft, animated. Explicitly NOT a card: no box, no fill, no colored bar.

INLINE COMPONENT: TesterChip (Item, width chipRow.width + 26, height 50) — props handle/url. HoverHandler id 'thov' always enabled, PointingHandCursor. Fill Rectangle: color thov.hovered ? Theme.surfaceLo : "transparent", border 1px thov.hovered ? Theme.lineStrong : Theme.line, both animated (Theme.quick). Row id 'chipRow' leftMargin 12 spacing 11: monogram ring = 30x30 Rectangle radius width/2, transparent fill, border 1.5px thov.hovered ? Theme.ember : Theme.brand (animated), centered Text = handle.charAt(0).toUpperCase() or "?" when handle empty (Theme.font, pixelSize 13, Font.Black, color hov→Theme.bright else Theme.cream); Column(spacing 2): handle Text (Theme.font, pixelSize 13, Font.DemiBold, hover-brightened) + static "BUG HUNTER" Text (Theme.dim, Theme.mono, pixelSize 8, letterSpacing 1.4).

External component dependencies that must remain resolvable: ShowcaseBackdrop, Eyebrow, and the Theme singleton from "Singletons" (Theme.bright, sun, cream, subtle, dim, faint, brand, ember, line, lineSoft, lineStrong, surfaceLo, radius, quick, font, fontJp, mono, display).
pragma ComponentBehavior: Bound + `required property var modelData` in both Repeater delegates — the delegates depend on bound component behavior.
DisplaysPage.qml: Detected-count readout (id: detected, top-left): "1 display detected" / "<N> displays detected" — singular/plural branch on page.monCount.

Quick-actions Row (id: quickRow, top-right): Mirror / Extend / DPI auto-scale HubButtons. Also inventoried as kind=action settings above because they rewrite persisted config; they must survive as buttons.

DRAG-ARRANGE CANVAS (id: canvasArea): the page's centrepiece. Rounded surfaceLo Rectangle, 1px Theme.line border, clip:true, width = parent.width - controls.width - 24. Contains a vestigial fully-transparent inset Rectangle (a dead 'faint grid baseline' placeholder that draws nothing).

Canvas Repeater (model: page.monCount — an INT count, deliberately not the draft array, so in-place draft mutation never rebuilds tiles): one MonitorTile per monitor. Tile x/y/width/height are computed from the logical layout via page.view() (k/ox/oy); minimum tile size clamped to 36x28 so a tiny/odd monitor stays grabbable.

Auto-fit viewport (computeView): scales the bounding box of all ENABLED monitors to 84% of the canvas and centres it; k floors at 0.05 when non-finite. bbox() returns a 1x1 unit box when nothing is enabled.
View FREEZE during drag (page.dragging / page.frozen): the fit is snapshotted on drag start so the canvas does not rescale under the cursor mid-drag.

Edge snapping on drop (endDrag → nearestSnap): candidate x/y edges are 0 plus, for every other enabled monitor, its near edge, its far edge, and its near-edge-minus-this-monitor's-footprint. Threshold = max(8, 22/k) logical px — i.e. ~22 screen px, zoom-independent.
normalize(): after every drop, re-bases the whole layout so the minimum enabled x and y are 0 (applied to ALL monitors including disabled ones).

MonitorTile visual contract (MonitorTile.qml): connector name (DemiBold 14, elided), "W×H" mono sub-label — replaced by the literal "off" when not live, a "MIRROR" mono badge (8px, letterSpacing 1.5) when mirrored, ember 2px ring + 16% ember fill when selected, 0.5 opacity + surfaceLo when disabled, PointingHandCursor. Emits tapped/dragDelta(dx,dy in logical px)/dragEnded; drag also selects (tapped fires on drag start).

Canvas empty/loading/error column (visible only when page.monCount === 0): three-way text — "Detecting displays…" (!listed) / "Couldn't read your displays." (listFailed) / "No displays detected."; plus a wrapped hint shown only on listFailed: "The ryoku-monitor helper looks out of date. Run 'ryoku deploy' (or update the desktop) and retry."; plus a Retry HubButton (icon "refresh", visible once listed) calling page.reload().
Canvas hint text (bottom-left, 11px faint): "Drag a display to arrange it · edges snap".

Controls Flickable (id: controls, fixed width 392, StopAtBounds) with a bespoke thin ScrollBar (7px wide, 4px implicit rounded Theme.line handle, opacity 0.4 → 0.7 hovered → 0.9 pressed, policy AsNeeded).
Empty-selection placeholder: "Select a display to configure it." (13px dim), shown whenever page.sel is null; both the per-monitor and POSITION SettingSections are hidden in that state.

Dynamic SettingSection title: the per-monitor group's header is the selected monitor's connector name (page.sel.name), rendered by SettingSection as mono caps with letterSpacing 2 and a hairline rule — it is a live readout, not a static string.

PROFILES explanatory body text: "Save this layout, keyed to the connected displays, so it returns automatically when you plug them in again." (wrapped, 12px dim). Note it is a plain Text child, not SettingSection's `description` property.
Profile name TextInput + Save button row (also inventoried above as a setting/action pair).

PROFILES LIST — Repeater over page.profiles (model is DYNAMIC DATA from `ryoku-monitor profiles`, not a fixed set of rows): each row is a 38px rounded Rectangle, width ctlCol.width - 12, hover-lit (Theme.keyTop), with an EMBER border when modelData.matches. Contains: profile name (DemiBold 13), a "CONNECTED" mono badge (8px, letterSpacing 1.5, ember) shown only when matches, an "Apply" HubButton → `ryoku-monitor load <name>` (matches saved monitors to current connectors by hardware identity, so DP-1/DP-2 swaps are tolerated) then listRefresh, and a bare trash Icon (15px, tints Theme.bad on hover, PointingHandCursor) → `ryoku-monitor rm <name>` then profileRefresh — a DESTRUCTIVE DELETE WITH NO CONFIRMATION.

ACTION BAR (id: bar, 60px, pinned bottom): the transactional status surface. Ember-tinted fill (8% ember) + 40% ember border when page.dirty, else surfaceLo/Theme.line, both ColorAnimation'd over Theme.medium. A 9px status dot (ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean) and the message "Unapplied layout changes" / "Layout matches your displays". Right side: Revert + Apply HubButtons (both enabled only when dirty).
Dirty computation (page.dirty): JSON.stringify(specsAll()) !== page.committed, gated on monCount > 0 — a whole-document string diff, not per-field dirty tracking.

Backing processes (Quickshell.Io Process): `ryoku-monitor list` (autostart, feeds the draft), `ryoku-monitor profiles` (autostart, feeds the list), a shared applyProc (apply + all three quick actions), and a shared profileProc (save | load | rm).

Refresh Timers: listRefresh (700ms, one-shot → page.reload()) after load/quick-actions; profileRefresh (300ms, one-shot → reloadProfiles()) after save/delete. Both are fixed-delay guesses that race the helper rather than waiting on process exit.
InputPage.qml: ACTION BAR (Rectangle id: bar, 60px, pinned bottom, bottomMargin 8) — mirrors ShellSettingsPage. Tints ember-at-8%-alpha with a 40%-alpha ember border while dirty, Theme.surfaceLo/Theme.line when clean, both colour-animated.
Dirty status dot (9px circle, Theme.ember when dirty / Theme.ok when saved) + status text: "Previewing unsaved changes" vs "Saved · live on your desktop".

HubButton "Reset to defaults" (icon "refresh") -> store.resetInput(). Always enabled. Domain-scoped ON PURPOSE: resets only the 25 inputKeys from store.defaults.input so it never clobbers appearance/env/rules held in the same shared store. Silently no-ops if the async `ryoku-hub hypr defaults` fetch has not landed.

HubButton "Revert" (icon "close") -> store.revert(). enabled: store.dirty. Re-adopts the committed doc AND shells out to `ryoku-hub hypr restore` for a full reload, because hyprctl eval cannot push some keywords back to a default or re-derive wallpaper border colours.

HubButton "Save" (icon "check", primary: true) -> store.save(). enabled: store.dirty. Stops the throttle, runs `ryoku-hub hypr save <json>`, regenerates settings.lua + reloads (which also locks in list changes), optimistically sets committed = snapshot.

HubButton "Apply system-wide" (icon "check") inside the KEY REMAPS section -> privileged `localectl set-x11-keymap` (polkit prompt) covering the SDDM greeter and the TTY. Gated on !store.dirty && !sysApplyProc.running. Also listed in settings as an action row.
Transient system-apply status readout with 3 colour-coded states, cleared after 6s by the sysApplyClear Timer.

THE LIVE DESKTOP ITSELF IS THE PREVIEW. There is no preview pane — every scalar edit routes through store.edit() -> queuePreview() (80ms throttle timer, coalescing via previewPending) -> `ryoku-hub hypr preview <full-json>`, which applies flash-free through hyprctl eval against the whole running session.
readonly property bool previewDirty: store.dirty — the contract the Hub reads to DROP the live preview when this page is left with unsaved edits. An external consumer depends on this property name.

Flickable + custom 7px-wide ScrollBar (4px Rectangle contentItem, Theme.line, opacity 0.4 idle / 0.7 hovered / 0.9 pressed, animated), StopAtBounds, clipped; contentHeight = max(col.height, height); column width = flick.width - 12, section spacing 30; every row capped at Math.min(parent.width, 460).

Inline `component TextFieldRow` (InputPage.qml:194-259) — a bespoke label+entry control defined nowhere else in the codebase. Ember focus border, placeholder overlay, selectAll on focus, commit-on-editing-finished, re-bind on focus loss.

Async model plumbing: Process layoutsProc (`ryoku-hub hypr layouts`, running at startup) and Process variantsProc (`ryoku-hub hypr variants <layout>`, re-run on layout change) parse JSON into Dropdown option models. Both fail silently (empty catch) — a parse error leaves the dropdown empty with no user-visible error.
Five SettingSection groups, in this order: KEYBOARD, KEY REMAPS, POINTER, TOUCHPAD, KEY REPEAT.
ShellSettingsPage.qml: Segmented tab bar (id: tabs) — 5 tabs frame/global/bar/sidebar/visualizer, sliding selection pill, fixed 86px segments, drives page.group.
Static hint Text beside the tabs: "Edits show on your desktop as you make them".
Flickable + custom ScrollBar (7px wide, AsNeeded, hover/press opacity 0.4/0.7/0.9, Theme.line) wrapping the whole control area, StopAtBounds.

Loader tab-body switch + NumberAnimation crossfade (id: fade) that sets item.opacity 0→1 on every tab change. Each tab body is a Component (frameComp/globalComp/barComp/sidebarComp/vizComp), so the subtree is destroyed and rebuilt on switch.
Two/three-column Row layouts with computed colW = (width - spacing)/2 — the Visualizer tab is a single Column with a full-width STYLE section above a 2-column Row.

BRAND identity swatch preview: 46x46 rounded Rectangle showing either the text mark (Theme.fontJp, 26px, Theme.brand) or the chosen image, with a Qt5Compat ColorOverlay tinting it to Theme.brand when markTint is on, plus a "Preview" caption. Falls back to 力 when markText is empty.
FileDialog (id: logoPicker) — OS file picker, title "Choose a logo image", nameFilters ["Images (*.svg *.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp)", "All files (*)"].
HubButton "Choose image" (icon: image) — action, opens logoPicker.
HubButton "Clear" (icon: close) — action, enabled only when markImage !== "", clears markImage.
markImage path readout Text — elide: ElideMiddle, reads "No image (using the text mark)" in Theme.faint when empty, else the path in Theme.cream.

BRAND explainer paragraph (max width 620) about swapping the 力 mark and "Ryoku" name across the shell, Ryoku's own apps keeping their brand, square SVG / 256x256 PNG guidance, tint behaviour, ~14px render size.
BAR explainer paragraph describing Noctalia/Caelestia/Aegis/Stele/Triptych/Nacre lineage and panel grow-from-edge behaviour.
Sidebar LEFT explainer paragraph ("Melts out of the frame's left edge when you hover (or click) the top-left corner, carrying your chosen feature panes as tabs in the order you enable them.").
Sidebar RIGHT explainer paragraph (same, right edge / top-right corner / system panes).

VizPreview live preview — 150px tall bordered Rectangle (Theme.surfaceLo, clipped) running a synthetic-spectrum plain-QML mirror of the real visualiser renderer; bound to style, shape, position, mirror, bars, height→heightFrac, thickness, bloom, reflection, enabled, peaks, segments. Exists because the real visualiser hides behind your windows. Does NOT model fps, adaptive, smoothing, gain or idleWave.
"LIVE PREVIEW" / "OFF" preview badge — pill over the preview, text driven by draft.enabled, mono 10px letterSpacing 2.
Bottom status/action bar (id: bar, 60px) — background and border tint to Theme.ember at 0.08/0.4 alpha when dirty, animated ColorAnimation on both.
Dirty status dot (9px) — Theme.ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean, animated.
Dirty status text — "Previewing unsaved changes" (Theme.bright) vs "Saved · live on your desktop" (Theme.dim).
HubButton "Reset to defaults" (icon: refresh) — action, always enabled, calls resetDefaults() which edit()s all 66 keys to the mirrored defaults (a live preview, still needs Save to commit).
HubButton "Revert" (icon: close) — action, enabled only when dirty, restores every key from committedVals and flushes.
HubButton "Save" (icon: check, primary) — action, enabled only when dirty, stops the throttle, flushes and snapshots draft into committedVals.

fc-list font scan Process — runs once on completion (`fc-list : family`), StdioCollector splits lines, takes the token before the first comma, dedupes, and replaces page.installedFonts, which reshapes the Font dropdown asynchronously.

Three FileView config bridges with JsonAdapters — cfgShell (shell.json), cfgViz (visualizer.json, watchChanges + onFileChanged reload), cfgBrand (brand.json); all blockLoading, printErrors false, atomicWrites.
Component.onDestruction revert-on-leave — writes committedVals back to all three files if the page is destroyed while dirty, so a preview is never left applied.
ColorField's own internal surfaces (inside the component, not the page): live swatch, manual hex entry field, and the 8-swatch dark preset strip.
RicesPage.qml: VERDICT: this is a gallery/host page, not a settings form. There is NO SettingSection, NO ToggleRow, SliderRow, NumberField, ChoiceRow, Dropdown, ColorField or SettingField anywhere in the file, no `defaults` object literal and no QtObject draft. RicesPage writes no config key itself — every mutation is an imperative Process shell-out to `ryoku-hub rice <verb>`. The settings array above is therefore actions + two real inputs (the mode Segmented and the rice-name field) + the readouts, all of which must survive a rewrite.
Mode Segmented (My rices / Browse) at :193 — reads as a sub-tab strip; the store side lazy-loads its catalog on first entry.

Inline capture wizard (:227-283) — a 46px bar that REPLACES the descriptive blurb in place (blurb is `visible: !page.capturing`). Name TextInput + Save + Cancel, focus auto-grabbed via `focus: page.capturing`, border animating to Theme.ember on focus. Not a modal, not a dialog — an in-flow strip.
Loading spinners: My rices (:296, visible page.loading) and Browse (:360, visible page.catalogLoading), both Spinner size 24, horizontally centered.

Empty state — My rices (:302-325): visible only when !loading && rices.length===0 && !capturing. Icon "palette" size 40 Theme.faint, heading "No rices yet" (16px DemiBold), body "Tune your desktop the way you like, then Save current setup to make your first rice, or Browse the store for one to install." topPadding 20.

Empty/error state — Browse (:366-387): visible when !catalogLoading && catalog.length===0. Icon flips on error (page.catalogError ? "close" : "palette"); text flips between "Couldn't reach the rice store." and "No rices in the store yet."; carries the Try again button. Error and empty share ONE surface.
My rices gallery (:327-341) — Flow id:grid, spacing 14, Repeater over page.rices, 3-up via Math.max(280, (grid.width - 28)/3).
Store gallery (:389-411) — Flow id:storeGrid, same geometry, Repeater over page.catalog, tiles get store:true.

RiceTile (RiceTile.qml) — storefront tile: 320x250 implicit, 150px shot area; Image preview OR a synthesized mockup drawn from the rice's own look (mockSurface/mockAccent/mockRounding with Theme fallbacks) showing a fake window with 3 traffic-light dots; bottom scrim gradient (transparent→rgba(0,0,0,0.72), 66px); name overlay 18px DemiBold elided; ACTIVE pill (ember, "#0d1208" text, mono 9px letterSpacing 1.2) when rice.active; INSTALLED chip (check icon + Theme.ok) when store && installed — the two chips occupy the SAME top-right anchor; blurb fallback "A saved desktop look." clamped to 2 lines; compat chip "older Ryoku"/"newer Ryoku" (Theme.bad border when newer); version chip "v<createdWith>"; hover scale 1.012 + border→ember, all Behavior-animated.

RiceDetail drill-in (RiceDetail.qml, loaded at :415-436) — back chevron; large preview Rectangle height Math.min(320, width*0.5) with the same image-or-mockup fallback (Image sourceSize.width 1200, PreserveAspectCrop); name 20px DemiBold + "Changes …" mono summary; blurb 13px lineHeight 1.4; WHAT IT TOUCHES list; ALSO SETS list; the 6-button action Flow; EXPORTED TO block.

Detail action row (RiceDetail.qml:252-287) — a single Flow of six HubButtons in fixed order: Apply this rice / Duplicate / Set wallpaper / View config / Export / Delete. Delete sits in the same visual weight as the rest.
EXPORTED TO block (RiceDetail.qml:289-332) — appears only after a successful export; mono elided path + the bespoke "Show in files" hover button.

ImagePicker modal — wallpaper (:438) — fullscreen z:100 overlay: 0.55 black scrim (click = cancel), centered panel min(w-80,900) x min(h-60,640), thumbnail grid over ~/Pictures via FolderListModel, folders open in place.
ImagePicker modal — export (:447) — same component in foldersOnly mode (nameFilters sentinel ["ryoku-no-match"] so no files show), title "Export to a folder", rooted at $HOME.
ConfigViewer modal (:459) — read-only mono JSON manifest viewer, scrim-dismiss, panel min(w-80,760) x min(h-60,620), text stays selectable for copying.
Detail fade-in — Loader opacity Behavior, NumberAnimation duration Theme.medium, easing Theme.ease.

Two descriptive blurb paragraphs that are product copy, not labels: My rices (:288) "Save your whole desktop look, windows, bar, colours, wallpaper, and cursor, as a rice. Switch between looks anytime, and restore your original in one click." and Browse (:352) "Install a rice from the community store, then apply it from My rices. A rice built for a different Ryoku version still applies; it is reconciled to yours."
LayerRulesPage.qml: "Add rule" HubButton (top-right, icon "plus", anchored to page top/right) -> page.addRule() appends {namespace:"", action:"blur", value:""} to the draft list

Intro explanatory paragraph (id: intro), Theme.subtle 13px Medium, word-wrapped between page.left and addBtn.left: "Fine-tune layer-shell surfaces (the bar, launcher, notifications) by namespace (e.g. launcher, overview, bar): blur or dim them, or show them above the lockscreen. Applied on Save; a namespace that matches nothing has no effect."
Empty state Text: "No custom layer rules yet." — visible only when store.layerRules.length === 0, Theme.faint 13px, centered, topPadding 28

Flickable scroll region (id: flick) with a custom-styled vertical ScrollBar (policy AsNeeded, width 7, 4px Rectangle contentItem, Theme.line, opacity 0.4 idle / 0.7 hovered / 0.9 pressed with a NumberAnimation) — bespoke chrome, not a stock ScrollBar

Repeater-generated rule row cards (delegate Rectangle, height 56, Theme.surfaceLo, 1px Theme.line border, radius Theme.radius) — one per list entry; the row's namespace field width (nsW) is recomputed imperatively from needsValue so the layout reflows when the action changes

Per-row delete button (id: delBtn, 30x30): "trash" Icon at size 17, tint Theme.dim -> Theme.bad on hover, backing Rectangle fades to 12%-alpha Theme.bad on hover, HoverHandler sets PointingHandCursor, TapHandler -> page.removeRule(index). No confirmation dialog.

Dropdown popup surface itself (Popup + ListView of option rows, hint column, hover/active tinting) rendered inside the Flickable/Repeater — a floating overlay whose stacking and positioning (y below field, right-aligned x) must survive a rewrite
Bottom action bar (id: bar, height 60, "mirrors Shell Settings") whose fill+border animate to 8%/40%-alpha Theme.ember when store.dirty, else Theme.surfaceLo/Theme.line
Dirty status dot (id: statusDot, 9x9 circle): Theme.ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean, animated
Dirty status text: "Unsaved changes" (Theme.bright) vs "Saved · applies on save" (Theme.dim) — the page's only signal that edits are not live
"Clear all" HubButton (icon "trash", enabled only when store.layerRules.length > 0) -> store.editList("layerRules", []) — wipes every rule with no confirmation and no undo other than Revert
"Revert" HubButton (icon "close", enabled only when store.dirty) -> store.revert(): re-adopts committed AND spawns `ryoku-hub hypr restore`, a full compositor reload
"Save" HubButton (icon "check", primary: true, enabled only when store.dirty) -> store.save(): spawns `ryoku-hub hypr save <whole-doc JSON>`, regenerates settings.lua and reloads
HyprStore instance (id: store) — the page's whole data engine; spawns `ryoku-hub hypr defaults` and `ryoku-hub hypr get` on load and gates everything on store.ready

Hub.qml file-actions header for this page (line 182: luaSec([])): an "Edit user.lua" button targeting ~/.config/hypr/user.lua, with an EMPTY view list — unlike every sibling Lua page, Layer Rules has NO shipped defaults file to view
ProfilePage.qml: NO SETTINGS ON THIS PAGE. ProfilePage.qml (98 lines) is a host/showcase page, not a settings page. It contains zero ToggleRow/SliderRow/NumberField/ChoiceRow/Dropdown/ColorField/SettingField/Segmented/SettingSection instances, zero Repeaters, zero set-membership toggles, zero inline `component` blocks, zero tabs, and writes zero config keys to disk. Verified by grepping the whole Profile subtree (ProfileCard.qml, ProfileStats.qml, ShowcaseBackdrop.qml) for every control type and for `Config.`/`writeConfig`/`.set(` — the only hit in 1226 lines of children is a hover-only MouseArea. The page is a pure composition of the five visual surfaces below; a rewrite must preserve them as layout/art, not as settings.
ShowcaseBackdrop — ambient animated backdrop, `anchors.fill: parent`, sits behind everything. Shared component (ShowcaseBackdrop.qml:8 notes it is used by ProfilePage and others).

Lady Justice ambient art (id: justice) — Image source `art/marble-justice.png` (relative path), PreserveAspectFit, smooth, asynchronous, opacity 0.42, square (width: height, height: parent.height), anchored to the right edge and deliberately bleeding off it via negative `anchors.rightMargin: -parent.width * 0.04`, vertically centered. Has `layer.enabled: true` with a MultiEffect applying brightness -0.18 and saturation -0.35 so she reads faintly behind the data. The website's 'beauty panel' motif as backdrop.

Left-edge fade Rectangle — anchored `anchors.fill: justice`, horizontal Gradient dissolving the art into the canvas: stop 0.0 = Theme.bgBot (opaque page color), stop 0.45 = transparent, stop 1.0 = transparent. Purely a dim-out mask over the art; not a control.

ProfileCard hero (id: hero) — the specimen card, the page's hero. Anchored left (leftMargin 18), vertically centered, `cardWidth: page.cardW`. Wrapped in `layer.enabled: true` + MultiEffect drop shadow (shadowEnabled, shadowColor rgba(0,0,0,0.55), shadowBlur 1.0, shadowVerticalOffset 12, autoPaddingEnabled). Internally (ProfileCard.qml:766) it carries a hover-tracking MouseArea with `acceptedButtons: Qt.NoButton` and hoverEnabled that drives an interactive 3D tilt + foil shimmer (writes root.tiltX/tiltY/shimNX/shimNY/hoverPct from cursor position, resets on exit). This is a live hover interaction that must survive — but it is a display effect, not a setting.

Gutter hairline rule — a 1px Rectangle in the gutter separating specimen from dossier. Anchored to `hero.right` (leftMargin 21) and spanning hero.top→hero.bottom with 10px top/bottom insets. Vertical Gradient fading in at both ends: transparent → Qt.alpha(Theme.cream, 0.09) at 0.16 → same at 0.84 → transparent.

ProfileStats dossier — the extended system-stats readout panel on the right. Anchored `hero.right` (leftMargin 44) to `parent.right` (rightMargin 26), and vertically bound to the hero (top: hero.top + 8, bottom: hero.bottom). A read-only stats surface (310 lines), no controls.

Page header (title 'Profile', subtitle 'Your machine as a collector's specimen, built to share alongside your rice.') is NOT in this file — it is supplied by Hub.qml:52 from the sectionDefs table, and the nav entry `{ key: 'profile', name: 'Profile', icon: 'user', pinned: 'top' }` at Hub.qml:23 pins it to the fixed top band of the NavRail. Instantiated at Hub.qml:307 via `Component { id: profileComp; ProfilePage {} }`, routed by `pageFor('profile')` at Hub.qml:277.
AppearancePage.qml: Tab bar: Segmented control (top-left) with 6 keys — rices/look/borders/cursor/wallpaper/comfort — driving page.group; sliding selection pill, fixed 86px segments.
Standing caption beside the tab bar: "Edits show on your desktop as you make them" (Theme.faint, 12px).

Rices tab: the ENTIRE tab is a delegated sub-page (RicesPage {} via ricesComp), embedded and sized by implicitHeight so the shared Flickable scrolls it. It contributes ZERO settings but a whole surface that must survive: its own Segmented ("My rices" / "Browse"), rice tile galleries (Flow+Repeater of RiceTile, 3-up, min 280px), the capture wizard (inline name TextInput + Save/Cancel, placeholder "Name this rice (for example, My Setup)"), RiceDetail loader, ImagePicker for per-rice wallpaper, a folders-only ImagePicker for export, ConfigViewer modal, Spinners, empty states ("No rices yet", "No rices in the store yet.", "Couldn't reach the rice store." + "Try again"), and action buttons (Save current setup, Restore original, apply/fork/delete/install/setwall/export/reveal). Needs its own separate inventory — /home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/RicesPage.qml
Action bar (bottom, Rectangle id: bar): visible ONLY on the store tabs (look/borders/cursor) via page.storeTab; 60px, tints ember at 8% with a 40% ember border when store.dirty.
Action bar status dot + label: 9px dot (Theme.ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean) and text "Previewing unsaved changes" / "Saved · live on your desktop".
Action button: "Reset to defaults" (HubButton, icon refresh) -> store.resetAppearance() — always enabled, no confirmation.

Action button: "Revert" (HubButton, icon close) -> store.revert(), enabled only when store.dirty; re-adopts committed and runs `ryoku-hub hypr restore` (a full reload, because eval can't undo some keywords).
Action button: "Save" (HubButton, icon check, primary) -> store.save(), enabled only when store.dirty.
Wallpaper gallery: the thumbnail grid itself (Flow/Repeater, hover-scale, active ember ring) — the selection is a setting, but the browsing/preview surface is not.
"Shuffle" HubButton (icon refresh, Wallpaper tab) -> `ryoku-shell wallpaper next` — an action, not a value; re-reads the state file on exit.
"Choose image" HubButton (Borders/IMAGE BORDER) + the elided path readout — opens the picker; the resulting path is the setting.
ImagePicker modal, hoisted to page level (deliberately, so its overlay covers the whole page rather than the borders column) for the imgborders image.
Comfort error banner: page.comfortError text in Theme.ember, shown on brightnessctl/nightlight non-zero exit, auto-cleared by a 6000ms Timer.
Per-tab Loader with a fade-in NumberAnimation (opacity 0 -> 1, Theme.medium) — tab content is destroyed and recreated on every switch.
Flickable + custom 7px-wide ScrollBar (4px pill, opacity 0.4 idle / 0.7 hover / 0.9 pressed), StopAtBounds; bottom anchor swaps between bar.top and parent.bottom depending on the tab.

Look tab's hardcoded two-column Row (spacing 56, colW = (width - spacing)/2) with a fixed section-to-column assignment: LEFT = SHAPE, GAPS, BEHAVIOUR, TITLE BARS; RIGHT = OPACITY, BLUR, DEPTH & MOTION, GLOW, GLASS. The columns are layout, not data — flattening them changes the page.

Standing help/description Texts that are page content, not settings: the Borders scheme explainer (two variants), the ANIMATED BORDER caveat, the cursor "0 seconds" and "Themes are read from your installed icon sets..." notes, the THEME PALETTE explainer (4 variants incl. the unreachable "custom"), the wallpaper "Pick a wallpaper to retheme the desktop..." line, the NIGHT LIGHT persistence note, and the four "Applies on Save." plugin notes (hyprbars, hyprglass, imgborders, dynamicCursors).
readonly property bool previewDirty: store.dirty — an outward contract read by the host Hub to drop an unsaved live preview when the page is left. Not UI, but it must survive.

Background Processes with no visible control: cursorsProc (`ryoku-hub hypr cursors`, autostart), schemeQueryProc/schemeApplyProc, wallListProc/wallStateProc/wallApplyProc/wallNextProc, brightGetProc/brightSetProc, nightStatusProc/nightProc, plus HyprStore's defProc/getProc/previewProc/saveProc/restoreProc.

Lazy refresh wiring: onGroupChanged re-runs refreshWalls() on wallpaper, refreshComfort() on comfort, schemeQueryProc on borders; Component.onCompleted does refreshWalls() + refreshComfort() up front.
EnvironmentPage.qml: Intro help paragraph (Text id: intro, Theme.subtle, 13px, WordWrap, anchored left of addBtn with 18px margin): "Environment variables for the Hyprland session, layered over the base. Add a NAME and value (e.g. MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND = 1); they take full effect at next login." — carries the load-bearing next-login caveat.
"Add variable" HubButton (icon: "plus", top-right, anchored parent.right/parent.top) → page.add(), which appends a blank {key:"",value:""} row to a fresh slice of store.env.

Flickable scroll region (id: flick) — contentWidth: width, contentHeight: max(col.height, height), clip: true, boundsBehavior: StopAtBounds, top margin = max(intro.height, addBtn.height) + 24, bottom anchored to bar.top with 18px margin.

Custom-styled vertical ScrollBar (id: sb) — policy AsNeeded, width 7, contentItem Rectangle implicitWidth 4, Theme.radius, Theme.line, opacity 0.9 pressed / 0.7 hovered / 0.4 idle with a Theme.quick NumberAnimation.

Repeater-driven row list (model: store.env) inside Column id: col (width flick.width - 12, spacing 10) — each delegate is a 48px card laying out key field / value field / delete button in a Row with gap 10, 12px side margins; layout math: delW 32, fieldsW = width - 24 - delW - gap*2, keyW = round(fieldsW * 0.42).

Per-row delete button (bespoke Item, not a HubButton) — 32x32, trash Icon (size 16, weight 1.8), HoverHandler with PointingHandCursor, hover paints Theme.keyTop fill + Theme.bad border and tints the icon Theme.bad (idle Theme.dim), TapHandler scales to 0.94 while pressed → page.remove(rowRect.index). No confirmation prompt.

Empty-state text: "No custom variables yet — add one to get started." (Theme.faint, 13px, centered in flick), visible only when store.ready && store.env.length === 0 — gated on ready so it does not flash before `hypr get` returns.

Action bar (Rectangle id: bar, 60px tall, bottom-anchored with 8px margin, Theme.radius) — "mirrors Shell Settings". Background/border swap on store.dirty: ember at 8% alpha fill + ember at 40% alpha border when dirty, else Theme.surfaceLo / Theme.line, both with Theme.medium ColorAnimations.
Status dot (9x9, radius 4.5, left margin 20) — Theme.ember when dirty, Theme.ok when clean, Theme.quick ColorAnimation.
Status text — "Unsaved changes" (Theme.bright) when dirty, else "Saved · applies on save" (Theme.dim); 13px DemiBold.

"Clear all" HubButton (icon: "trash") — enabled only when store.env.length > 0 → store.editList("env", []) . Wipes every variable with no confirmation; recoverable only via Revert while still unsaved.

"Revert" HubButton (icon: "close") — enabled only when store.dirty → store.revert(), which re-adopts store.committed AND shells out to `ryoku-hub hypr restore` (full hyprctl reload + hyprctl setcursor re-assert).

"Save" HubButton (icon: "check", primary: true) — enabled only when store.dirty → store.save(), which runs `ryoku-hub hypr save <full snapshot JSON>` (writes hypr.json, regenerates settings.lua, hyprReload()) and optimistically marks committed.

HyprStore instance (id: store) — the whole Hub override document (appearance/input/cursor/env/windowRules/layerRules/appOverrides/autostart/keybinds/anim/plugins) loaded via `ryoku-hub hypr get` + `ryoku-hub hypr defaults`; exposes ready/dirty/committed/defaults and the edit/editList/save/revert API this page drives.
Focus affordance: both text fields animate their border to Theme.ember on activeFocus (ColorAnimation, Theme.quick) — the only focus indicator on the page.

Page title/subtitle are NOT in this file — Hub.qml supplies pageMeta["environment"] = { title: "Environment", subtitle: "Environment variables for the Hyprland session." }, nav entry { key: "environment", name: "Environment", icon: "variable", group: "Advanced" }, instantiated via Component { id: environmentComp; EnvironmentPage {} }.
ConnectionsPage.qml: NO SETTINGS IN THIS FILE. ConnectionsPage.qml is a 41-line host/shell page only: a subtab bar plus a Loader. It contains zero SettingSection groups, zero ToggleRow/SliderRow/NumberField/ChoiceRow/Dropdown/ColorField/SettingField rows, zero Repeater-generated setting rows, zero set-membership toggles, zero inline `component` blocks, zero `defaults` object literal or QtObject draft, and writes nothing to disk. The settings inventory is empty because the settings are not here.

Subtab bar (Segmented control, id: tabs), anchored top-left. Hardcoded 3-entry model of {key,label} pairs: key "wifi" label "Wi-Fi"; key "bluetooth" label "Bluetooth"; key "hotspot" label "Hotspot". Bound to `page.sub`; onSelected writes `page.sub = k`. This is view navigation, not a persisted setting.

Sliding selection pill inside Segmented.qml: a Rectangle animated on x (NumberAnimation, Theme.medium, Theme.ease) that travels to `4 + indexOfKey(current) * 86`. Per-segment hover (HoverHandler, PointingHandCursor) and tap (TapHandler) affordances, with label color/weight shifting on select+hover (Theme.bright/cream/dim, DemiBold vs Medium, ColorAnimation Theme.quick).

Body Loader (id: body) filling the area below the tab bar with anchors.topMargin 22. sourceComponent is a nested ternary: sub==="wifi" -> wifiComp, else sub==="bluetooth" -> btComp, else hsComp. Swapping subtabs destroys the outgoing tab and constructs the incoming one.

Delegated tab surfaces (the real Connections feature; each is a separate file and holds all the actual settings/controls): /home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/WifiTab.qml (624 lines), /home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/BluetoothTab.qml (645 lines), /home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/HotspotTab.qml (417 lines). These must be inventoried separately; this file's contract is only that it mounts them.
Transient page state `property string sub` (initial value "wifi") — which subtab is showing. Not persisted, not a config key; resets to Wi-Fi on every mount/reload.
RashinPage.qml: ABOUT section: a long static prose block (Theme.subtle, 13px, wrapped, lineHeight 1.45) pitching Rashin as an optional fully-local agent OS — the maintained machine map, the agents that read it (Hermes, Claude Code, codex, opencode, Oh My Pi), the local dashboard, 'nothing ever leaves the machine, and Rashin stays off until you switch it on'. Load-bearing product copy; a rewrite must carry it verbatim.

STATUS dossier: four read-only StatusRows (Daemon / Vault files / Hermes agent / Agents wired) driven entirely by an out-of-process `ryoku-rashin status --json` snapshot. Not settings — a live state report.

Inline `component StatusRow: Item` (line 127): bespoke read-only row — label on the left (Theme.cream, 13px), value in a mono hairline pill on the right (height 22, width chip.implicitWidth+20, Theme.radius, transparent fill, 1px border at 40% alpha of `level`, mono 11px Medium text tinted `level`). Height 30, width parent-dependent. Must survive as a component, not be flattened into label/value pairs.
HERMES section: static prose block (Theme.dim, 13px, lineHeight 1.4) explaining what the setup does and that an existing Hermes install is left untouched.
Hermes setup wizard: an external, out-of-page flow in a floating kitty terminal (class ryoku-rashin-setup). The Hub only fires it and mirrors it.

Live setup progress console: FileView watching $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/ryoku-rashin/setup.json (fallback /tmp), watchChanges:true, onFileChanged -> reload(), onLoaded -> applySetup(). Renders as mono 11px text 'phase' or 'phase: detail', colored Theme.subtle when ok and Theme.bad when ok===false, visible only while setupPhase !== "". Phase 'done' triggers page.refresh(). The daemon writes it atomically (tmp+rename) from reportPhase() in ryoku/rashin/backend/setup.go.
'Set up Hermes agent' HubButton — an action, and one whose primary/ghost face flips on hermesConfigured.
'Open dashboard' HubButton — an action that shells out to xdg-open.
Static dashboard URL caption 'http://127.0.0.1:3600' (Theme.faint, mono 11px) under the DASHBOARD button.

Flickable scroll host with a custom ScrollBar: 7px wide, contentItem implicitWidth 4, Theme.radius, Theme.line, opacity 0.9 pressed / 0.7 hovered / 0.4 idle with a Theme.quick NumberAnimation; policy AsNeeded, boundsBehavior StopAtBounds, clip true, anchors.margins 4. Column spacing 26, bottomPadding 20 (SettingSection stacks its own items at spacing 16).

Process plumbing that is real surface, not settings: statusProc (deliberately wrapped in `sh -c` so a MISSING binary still closes stdout and fires onStreamFinished — a bare missing binary would start nothing and fire nothing), enableProc and disableProc (both onExited -> refresh()), plus Component.onCompleted -> refresh(). The installed=false path is inferred from empty/unparseable stdout inside a try/catch.

Page-level state properties that are readouts, not stored config: installed (optimistic true), daemonEnabled, running, vaultExists, vaultFiles, hermesInstalled, hermesConfigured, agentsPresent, agentsWired, wiredSummary, setupPhase, setupDetail, setupOk.
PerformancePage.qml: Scroll container: Flickable filling the page, anchors.margins 4, contentHeight bound to the Column's implicitHeight, clip true, boundsBehavior StopAtBounds, with a vertical ScrollBar attached (ScrollBar.vertical). Section Column spacing 26; SettingSection internal body spacing 16.

Config seeding on first run: FileView `Component.onCompleted: if (!cfg.text()) cfg.writeAdapter()` — writes performance.json populated with every default if the file is absent or empty. This is a side effect, not a setting, and the page is the only writer that creates the file.

Live external-edit sync: FileView has watchChanges: true + `onFileChanged: reload()`, so edits made to performance.json outside the hub (or by another surface) re-render the toggles immediately. blockLoading: true makes the initial read synchronous; printErrors: false silences read errors.

Compositor reload action: `page.reloadCompositor()` runs `Quickshell.execDetached(["hyprctl", "reload"])`. Fired by exactly 3 of the 10 toggles (lowPowerMode, disableBlur, disableShadows) and by no others. It is an imperative side effect with no UI of its own.
No tabs, no previews, no live console, no drag-arrange canvas, no gallery, no wizard, and no HubButton / action buttons exist on this page. Every visible control is a ToggleRow.

Long labels double as inline help text: this page carries no SettingSection `description` (the component supports one) and no separate helper-text rows — the explanatory prose lives inside each ToggleRow `label` string.
LockscreenPage.qml: LOADING STATE — centred Column (width min(page.width-96, 420), spacing 16) visible while page.loading; Spinner size 26. Driven by `ryoku-hub lock catalog` (Process catalogProc), kicked on Component.onCompleted and after every apply/install.

EMPTY / FAILED STATE — visible when page.loadFailed (set when the catalog JSON parses to zero skins, or fails to parse at all): lock Icon size 44 tint Theme.faint + Text "No lock skins found. Install qylock to add some." + HubButton label "Try again" icon "refresh" -> page.reload().

HEADER EXPLAINER (static copy, must survive verbatim) — "Browse every qylock skin. Selecting one installs it if needed, then applies it to both your lock screen and the sign-in screen; you'll be asked for your password." (Theme.faint, 12px, Medium, elided).

HEADER STATUS/ERROR LINE — second Text, visible when !page.online || page.error !== "". Shows page.error in Theme.bad when set, else "Offline: showing installed skins only." in Theme.faint. One line serves two unrelated conditions.
"Refresh" HubButton (icon "refresh") — top-right of the 40px header bar; disabled while pendingSlug !== ""; re-runs the catalog fetch. ACTION, not a setting.

BENTO / MASONRY GRID — Flickable (clip, StopAtBounds, contentHeight = masonry.implicitHeight + 18, opacity fade on Theme.quick) containing a Row of Repeater-generated Columns. Column count is responsive and hardcoded: 4 at width >= 1320, 3 at >= 980, 2 at >= 640, else 1 (page.cols). Column width = (masonry.width - (cols-1)*14)/cols, spacing 14, masonry.width = flick.width - 10, topPadding 4.

GREEDY COLUMN-BALANCING ALGORITHM — page.buildColumns(list, n): each skin goes into the currently shortest column, height ESTIMATED as 300 + ceil(blurb.length/30)*16, plus 14 gutter. Imperative, re-runs whenever skins or cols change (readonly property grouped).

CUSTOM SCROLLBAR — ScrollBar.vertical, policy AsNeeded, width 7, contentItem Rectangle implicitWidth 4, radius Theme.radius, color Theme.line, opacity 0.9 pressed / 0.7 hovered / 0.4 idle with a Theme.quick animation.

LOCK SKIN TILE (LockscreenTile.qml, /home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/LockscreenTile.qml) — the repeated card. Flat surface (Theme.surfaceLo, Theme.surface on hover), border 2px Theme.ember when active else 1px Theme.line/ember-on-hover, radius Theme.radius, implicitHeight = body.implicitHeight + 34, 16px margins. Whole card is a TapHandler: taps apply the skin, but only if !active && !busy. HoverHandler sets a PointingHandCursor.

ANIMATED GIF PREVIEW HERO — per tile, 16:9 (height = round(width*9/16)), radius Theme.radius, bg Theme.keyBot, 1px border that warms to Theme.ember on hover/active. AnimatedImage, PreserveAspectCrop, cache:false, asynchronous:true. Source is file://<themes>/<slug>/preview.gif for installed skins that shipped one, else the upstream raw gif https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Darkkal44/qylock/main/Assets/<gif>.gif. Gif basename is resolved by normalising both sides (lowercase, strip non-alphanumerics) against the slug's TOP segment, so sibling variants share one gif; lockGifAlias overrides last-of-us and windows_7.

LAZY LOAD / NEAR-VIEWPORT GATE — tile.onScreen maps the tile into the Flickable and keeps a 600px preload margin; both source and playing are gated on it, so remote gifs load and animate only near the viewport.
GIF PLACEHOLDER — centred lock Icon size 30 tint Theme.faint, visible while gif.status !== AnimatedImage.Ready or nothing resolved.

"Preview" CHIP (per tile) — bottom-left of the hero, height 28, radius Theme.radius, black 55% fill, border warms to Theme.ember on hover; play Icon size 11 weight 2 + "Preview" text (11px DemiBold, Theme.bright). Visible only when installed && !busy; fades in (Theme.quick) on tile or chip hover. Click -> Quickshell.execDetached([~/.local/share/quickshell-lockscreen/lock.sh, slug]). THIS ACTUALLY LOCKS THE SCREEN with that skin — it is not a preview pane. ACTION.
BUSY OVERLAY (per tile) — fills the hero at 60% black while busy; Spinner size 24 + Text "Downloading… <sizeText>" when installing, else "Applying…".

ORDINAL READOUT — mono, 26px DemiBold, zero-padded to 2 digits ("01"), Theme.ember when active/hovered else Theme.faint. Assigned imperatively as catalog index+1 at parse time (ss[i].ordinal = i + 1).

STATE BADGE — 7px dot (visible when busy/active/installed) + mono 10px DemiBold letterSpacing 1.5 label. Exactly five states, precedence order: "INSTALLING…" (busy && installing) > "APPLYING" (busy) > "ACTIVE" > "INSTALLED" > "↓  <sizeText>" (download weight, when sizeKB > 0) > hidden. Accent (Theme.ember) when busy || active; Theme.subtle when merely installed; else Theme.faint.

INSTALL-SIZE READOUT — tile.sizeText derives from skin.sizeKB: "" when <= 0, "<n> MB" (rounded) at >= 1024, else "<n> KB". Size comes from summing every blob under themes/<slug>/ in the upstream git tree.

TILE METADATA COPY — tags row (mono 9px, AllUppercase, letterSpacing 1.5, joined with "  ·  "), skin name (18px DemiBold Theme.bright), summary (13px Medium Theme.cream), blurb (12px, lineHeight 1.32, WordWrap, maximumLineCount 2, elided). All hidden when empty.
HOVER CHEVRON — bottom-right Icon "chevron" size 15 weight 2 rotated -90, Theme.ember, fades in only when hovered && !active && !busy.
DOWNLOAD-ON-SELECT — clicking an uninstalled tile downloads the whole skin from upstream into a sibling temp dir and only os.Renames it into place on full success. ACTION with network + disk effects.
POLKIT / pkexec PASSWORD PROMPT — raised out of process on every apply (escalateGreeter re-execs the hub binary as `pkexec <self> lock apply-greeter <slug>`). Cancelling it fails the whole apply.

OFFLINE FALLBACK PATH — any catalog fetch/parse error silently degrades to the installed-only local listing (LockResponse.Online false), which is what flips the "Offline: showing installed skins only." line. Same grid, different data source.
StorePage.qml: NO SETTINGS EXIST ON THIS PAGE. StorePage.qml is a pure host/shell page — 90 lines, zero config keys, zero writes to any json/conf file. It contains no ToggleRow, SliderRow, NumberField, ChoiceRow, Dropdown, ColorField, SettingField, SettingSection, no defaults object literal, no QtObject draft, no Repeater-generated setting rows, no set-membership toggles, and no inline `component` blocks. A rewrite must preserve it as a container, not convert it into a settings form.
ShowcaseBackdrop (line 13) — decorative full-bleed animated background, `anchors.fill: parent`. Purely visual, no state.

Refresh button (id: refreshBtn, lines 23-55) — 36x36 Rectangle, `radius: Theme.radius`, sits LEFT of the segmented switch inside `Row { id: head }` at `z: 3`, anchored top-left. Hover: fill `Theme.surface` else transparent; border 1px `Theme.ember` on hover else `Theme.line`, with a `ColorAnimation { duration: Theme.quick }`. Contains an `Icon { name: "refresh"; size: 15; weight: 2 }` tinted `Theme.bright` on hover else `Theme.dim`. ACTION, not a setting.

Refresh spinner animation — `RotationAnimation on rotation { running: refreshBtn.spinning; loops: Animation.Infinite; from: 0; to: 360; duration: 800 }`. `readonly property bool spinning: store.tab === "plugins" ? pluginsPage.refreshing : extrasPage.loading` — one button reflecting two different child pages' in-flight state depending on the active tab.

Refresh TapHandler routing (lines 44-54) — tab-dependent imperative dispatch. On "plugins": sets `pluginsPage.refreshing = true`, then calls `pluginsPage.loadCatalog()` then `pluginsPage.refresh()`. On "bundles": calls `extrasPage.reload()` only (ExtrasPage sets its own `loading` flag inside reload()). The asymmetry is real and load-bearing.

Segmented catalogue switch (id: seg, lines 57-66) — VIEW SELECTOR, NOT A PERSISTED SETTING. model: [{key:"plugins", label:"Plugins"}, {key:"bundles", label:"Bundles"}]; `current: store.tab`; `onSelected: (k) => store.tab = k`. Backed by `property string tab: "plugins"` (line 11) — transient session state, never written to disk, resets to "plugins" on every construction. Segmented.qml renders a sliding selection pill over `Theme.surfaceLo` with a `Theme.line` border, hardcoded `segW: 86`, `implicitWidth: count * segW + 8`, `implicitHeight: 34`.

Hosted PluginsPage (id: pluginsPage, lines 76-81) — `anchors.fill: parent`, `visible: store.tab === "plugins"`, `storeMode: true`. Contributes the Discover grid: a Flow of PluginStoreCard tiles (width `Math.max(300, (grid.width - 36) / 3)`, `spacing: 18`, `topPadding: 4` because storeMode) with LIVE PREVIEWS, inside a clipped Flickable. Tapping a card sets `detailPlugin` + `view = "detail"` and opens PluginStoreDetail — a Profile-style featured showcase with an Install action. Catalogue source: `ryoku-hub extras plugincatalog`; installs: `ryoku-hub extras plugin <id>`.

storeMode suppression on PluginsPage — because `storeMode: true`, PluginsPage HIDES its own internal 32x32 refresh button (line 138) and its own Discover|Installed segmented switch (line 164, including the installed-count badge pill). The Installed/management half deliberately lives on AddonsPage instead. StorePage only browses + installs. A rewrite that drops `storeMode: true` would resurrect duplicate refresh buttons and a duplicate tab strip.

Hosted ExtrasPage (id: extrasPage, lines 83-88) — `anchors.fill: parent`, `visible: store.tab === "bundles"`, `storeMode: true`. Contributes the extras bundle bento grid (ExtraBundleCard tiles), ExtraBundleDetail with ExtraItemRow install/remove actions run via `ryoku-extras-install` in a floating terminal, plus loading / loadFailed states and a "Try again" HubButton (icon: "refresh") on failure.

storeMode suppression on ExtrasPage — `storeMode: true` hides ExtrasPage's own 32x32 refresh button (line 144); StorePage's header refresh drives `extrasPage.reload()` instead. Note the "Try again" HubButton is NOT gated on storeMode and still appears on load failure.
Content viewport (lines 69-89) — an Item anchored left/right/bottom to parent and `top: head.bottom` with `topMargin: 18`, holding both child pages stacked and toggled by `visible`.
RecordingPage.qml: Intro paragraph (page-level explainer, wraps, Theme.subtle/13px): "Ryoku records with gpu-screen-recorder, hardware-encoded on your GPU (it falls back to wf-recorder on multi-GPU machines). Start and stop from the bar's screen-capture Tools; these settings shape every recording. Files land in ~/Videos/Recordings." — load-bearing copy, it is where the user learns recording is started from the bar, not from this page.

SettingSection description copy, one per group, all user-facing: QUALITY = "Higher framerate is smoother (120 gets closer to a high-refresh panel); higher quality and HEVC/AV1 are crisper but larger. Constant framerate plays and edits correctly everywhere; variable is smaller but can look choppy or import as 30fps." / ENCODER = "GPU encoding is fast and barely touches your CPU. CPU is a fallback if the GPU encoder misbehaves." / UNDER THE HOOD = "What the recorder resolves for this machine right now."

UNDER THE HOOD live readout — a mono/12px/lineHeight-1.5 Theme.dim Text that is NOT a setting: shows "Detecting…" until the probe returns, then three aligned columns built by string concat: "Backend    " + (infoBackend === "gsr" ? "gpu-screen-recorder" : "wf-recorder"), "Encoder    " + infoEncoder, and "Container  MP4  ·  <fps>fps <FRAMERATEMODE>  ·  <codec>  ·  <quality>". The Container line is half hardcoded (MP4) and half live-bound to the adapter, so it re-renders as the user changes the Dropdowns above.

Backend/encoder probe Process — spawns $HOME/.config/hypr/scripts/ryoku-cmd-screenrecord --info once at page load (Component.onCompleted: info.running = true), collects stdout via StdioCollector, JSON.parses {backend, encoder} into page.infoBackend / page.infoEncoder. Parse failures are swallowed by an empty catch, leaving the readout stuck on "Detecting…" forever. Command path is built from Quickshell.env("HOME") with an "" fallback.

Config file bootstrap — FileView Component.onCompleted: if (!cfg.text()) cfg.writeAdapter(), i.e. first open of the page materialises ~/.config/ryoku/recording.json with the six defaults. A rewrite that drops this leaves the file absent until the first edit.
External-change reload — FileView has watchChanges: true and onFileChanged: reload(), so the controls track edits made outside the Hub (hand-edits, other tools) without a restart.
Scroll container — Flickable filling the page with anchors.margins: 4, contentHeight bound to the Column, clip: true, boundsBehavior StopAtBounds, ScrollBar.vertical, Column spacing 26.
AutostartPage.qml: Intro/explainer Text (id: intro): "Commands Hyprland runs once at login, after the base Ryoku autostart (e.g. a tray applet or a sync client). Saved to your config; new commands start at your next login." — Theme.dim, 12px, WordWrap.
"Add command" HubButton (id: addBtn, icon "plus") — action: page.add(), appends a blank {"command": ""} row. Always enabled (never gated on dirty/ready).

Per-row delete button (id: delBtn) — bespoke 26x26 Item with an Icon name "trash", size 15, tint animates Theme.faint → Theme.bad on hover; HoverHandler sets Qt.PointingHandCursor; TapHandler fires page.remove(index). No confirmation, no undo.
Empty-state Text: "No autostart commands yet." — visible only when store.autostart.length === 0, Theme.faint, 13px.

Scrolling list surface: Flickable (id: flick) with boundsBehavior StopAtBounds, clip, contentHeight bound to the rows Column; Column spacing 10, width = flick.width - 12; each row is a 56px-tall Rectangle, Theme.surfaceLo, 1px Theme.line border, Theme.radius.

Custom ScrollBar (id: sb): policy AsNeeded, width 7, bespoke Rectangle contentItem (implicitWidth 4, Theme.line) whose opacity steps 0.4 → 0.7 hovered → 0.9 pressed with a NumberAnimation (Theme.quick).
Action bar (id: bar, "mirrors Shell Settings"): 60px Rectangle whose fill + border animate to an ember tint (alpha 0.08 fill / 0.4 border) when store.dirty, else Theme.surfaceLo / Theme.line.

Dirty status indicator: 9px status dot (id: statusDot) coloured Theme.ember when dirty else Theme.ok, plus a status Text reading "Unsaved changes" (Theme.bright) or "Saved · applies on save" (Theme.dim), 13px DemiBold.
"Clear all" HubButton (icon "refresh") — action: store.editList("autostart", []). Destructive, ALWAYS enabled (not gated on dirty), and offers no confirmation step.

"Revert" HubButton (icon "close") — enabled: store.dirty; action: store.revert(). Not a pure draft reset: it re-adopts committed AND spawns `ryoku-hub hypr restore`, reloading the live Hyprland session.

"Save" HubButton (icon "check", primary: true) — enabled: store.dirty; action: store.save(), which spawns `ryoku-hub hypr save <full-doc JSON>` and optimistically marks committed before the process reports back.
HyprStore instance (id: store) — the page-local backing engine; not a visible surface, but the page cannot function without it (it drives autostart, dirty, editList, save, revert).
ExtrasPage.qml: NO SETTINGS EXIST ON THIS PAGE. ExtrasPage.qml is a host/store page, not a settings page. Verified literally: grep for ToggleRow|SliderRow|NumberField|ChoiceRow|Dropdown|ColorField|SettingField|Segmented|SettingSection|ImagePicker|defaults|QtObject|Config|FileView|.conf|.json returns ZERO hits in this file. It writes no config key to any file, has no defaults object or draft QtObject, and has no live-preview semantics. Everything below is a surface, not a setting.

Data pipeline (must survive): Process catalogProc runs `ryoku-hub extras catalog`, StdioCollector parses JSON into page.bundles from o.bundles; parse error or empty array sets page.loadFailed = true; on stream finish it chains statusProc. Process statusProc runs `ryoku-extras-install status` and flattens o.bundles[].items[] into page.statusMap = { bundleId: { itemName: status } }.

Page state properties (internal, not user-facing): bundles [], statusMap ({}), loading (true), loadFailed (false), selectedId (""), storeMode (false), readonly reportDir = (env XDG_RUNTIME_DIR || "/tmp") + "/ryoku-extras", readonly selectedBundle (linear lookup of selectedId in bundles).

Page functions: reload() (loading=true, loadFailed=false, re-run catalogProc), installedCountFor(id) (counts statusMap entries equal to "present" or "installed"), runTerminal(args), open(id), closeDetail() (clears selectedId AND re-runs statusProc).
Loading state: centered Column (spacing 16, width Math.min(page.width - 96, 420)) visible while loading||loadFailed, containing Spinner size 26 visible while page.loading.

Failure state: Icon name "sparkles" size 44 tint Theme.faint + Text "Couldn't load the extras catalogue." (Theme.dim, 14px, AlignHCenter) + HubButton label "Try again" icon "refresh" onClicked page.reload(). ACTION BUTTON.

Page-local refresh chip (id extrasRefresh): 32x32 Rectangle, anchored top-right, rightMargin 8, radius Theme.radius, z 3, hover fills Theme.surface with Theme.ember border; Icon "refresh" size 15 weight 2, tint bright-on-hover; RotationAnimation 0->360 duration 800 loops Infinite while page.loading; TapHandler -> page.reload(). visible ONLY when !loading && !loadFailed && selectedId === "" && !storeMode. ACTION BUTTON.

Bento grid: Flickable (anchors.fill, visible when !loading && !loadFailed && selectedId==="", opacity Behavior NumberAnimation Theme.quick, contentHeight grid.implicitHeight + 18, clip, boundsBehavior StopAtBounds) containing Flow id grid (width flick.width - 10, topPadding 4, spacing 14).

Custom scrollbar (bespoke inline control): ScrollBar.vertical policy AsNeeded, width 7, contentItem Rectangle implicitWidth 4, radius Theme.radius, color Theme.line, opacity 0.9 pressed / 0.7 hovered / 0.4 idle with NumberAnimation Theme.quick. Appears in both ExtrasPage and ExtraBundleDetail.

Bundle card gallery: Repeater over page.bundles -> ExtraBundleCard, width Math.max(300, (grid.width - 28) / 3), bundle: modelData, installedCount: page.installedCountFor(modelData.id), onOpened -> page.open(modelData.id). This is CATALOGUE-DRIVEN — the row set is remote data, NOT a fixed model.

ExtraItemRow (/home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/ExtraItemRow.qml): 46px row; status indicator = Spinner (Theme.ember, size 15) while busy (installing|removing), "check" Icon (Theme.ok) when here (present|installed), else 6px dot (Theme.bad when failed, Theme.faint otherwise); item name (mono 13px DemiBold) + source tag (mono 9px, hidden when empty); subtitle shows reason when failed && reason !== "" else summary; 92x30 action area.

ExtraItemRow actions: ActionPill label "Install" (or "Retry" when failed), icon "download", visible when !busy && !here && status !== "deferred" -> arms + installItem(name) -> runTerminal([ryoku-extras-install, install, item, <bundleId>, <name>]). ActionPill "Remove" (icon "trash", danger) visible when !busy && here && (itemType === "package" || itemType === "nautilus-pack") -> arms + removeItem(name) -> runTerminal([ryoku-extras-install, remove, item, <bundleId>, <name>]). ACTION BUTTONS.

ExtraItemRow deferred note (NOT a button): quiet Text visible when status === "deferred", reading "Plugins" when itemType === "plugin" else "Manual" (mono 10px, Theme.faint). Scripts are never auto-removed; plugins are managed on the Plugins page.

Floating-terminal execution surface: page.runTerminal(args) does Quickshell.execDetached(["kitty", "--class", "ryoku-extras", "-e"].concat(args)). All four install/remove operations run in this detached kitty window with window class ryoku-extras (layer/window rules likely key off that class).

Live progress report watcher: ExtraBundleDetail FileView path reportDir + "/" + (bundle.id || "_") + ".json", watchChanges true, onFileChanged -> reload(), onLoaded -> applyReport(); applyReport sets detail.live = o.items and, when o.phase === "done" && armed, emits refreshRequested -> statusProc.running = true. This is the live console equivalent — per-item status streams in while the terminal runs.

Armed-override state machine: detail.armed (false) + detail.live ({}); arm() sets armed on every user-initiated action; onStatusesChanged resets armed=false and live={}; effStatus(name) returns live status when armed && live[name], else statuses[name], else "absent"; effReason(name) returns live reason only while armed; isHere(s) = present||installed; installedCount and anyPackagePresent derive from effStatus.

storeMode embed flag: set true by /home/nero/Work/ryoku-arch/ryoku/hub/quickshell/StorePage.qml (line 87). It ONLY suppresses the page-local refresh chip, because StorePage supplies a shared 36x36 refresh button plus the Segmented switch [{key: plugins, label: Plugins}, {key: bundles, label: Bundles}] that flips between PluginsPage and ExtrasPage. That Segmented belongs to StorePage, NOT to this file.

WifiTab.qml: SCAN BUTTON (HubButton, line 272-281): label swaps "Scan" ⇄ "Scanning…" off `page.scanning`, icon "refresh", `enabled: !page.scanning`, `visible: page.wifiOn`. Fires `startScan()` → runs `nmcli dev wifi rescan` (rescanProc) and restarts scanTimer. Action, not a setting.

CUSTOM SCROLLBAR (line 360-371): `ScrollBar.vertical`, policy AsNeeded, width 7, bespoke contentItem Rectangle implicitWidth 4, Theme.radius, Theme.line, opacity 0.9 pressed / 0.7 hovered / 0.4 idle with a Theme.quick Behavior.

SIGNAL BAR METER (line 420-456): bespoke 4-rect ascending glyph, 21x16, bottom-anchored. Bars are hardcoded at x=0/6/12/18, width 3, heights 4/8/12/16. Lit count = `Math.max(0, Math.min(4, Math.ceil(strength / 25)))`. Lit color = Theme.brand when connected else Theme.cream; unlit = Theme.faint.
ROW SSID TEXT (line 467-475): Theme.brand + DemiBold when connected, else Theme.cream + Medium; ElideRight.

ROW LOCK ICON (line 500-507): Icon name "lock", size 14, weight 1.7, `visible: netItem.secured`, tint Theme.ember when connected else Theme.dim.
ROW SIGNAL PERCENT (line 509-517): Text `strength + "%"`, Theme.subtle, with tabular figures (`font.features: { "tnum": 1 }`).

ROW TAP STATE MACHINE (`activateNetwork`, line 76-101): four branches — (1) tapping the row whose password sheet is already open collapses it; (2) connected → `net.disconnect()`; (3) known profile OR confirmed-open → `net.connect()` + `refresh()`; (4) otherwise → clear connectFailed, clear pwDraft, expand the password row. This is a bespoke interaction, not a control.

INLINE PASSWORD ROW (line 522-602): height animates 0 ⇄ 44 on `netItem.expanded` (Theme.medium / Theme.ease), opacity 0 ⇄ 1 (Theme.quick), `visible: height > 0.5`, clip true. Only ever appears for secured + unknown networks. Only ONE can be open at a time (single `page.expandedSsid` string).

Wrapped in a Rectangle whose border warms Theme.line → Theme.ember on activeFocus.
PASSWORD ROW CLOSE (X) BUTTON (line 572-585): bespoke 24x24 hit target, Icon "close" size 13, tint Theme.faint → Theme.ember on hover with a ColorAnimation. TapHandler clears `page.expandedSsid`.
CONNECTING SPINNER (line 587-592): size 14, tint Theme.ember, `visible: page.connecting`, sits between the X and the Connect button.
CONNECT BUTTON (HubButton, line 594-600): label "Connect", `primary: true`, `enabled: !page.connecting && pwField.text.length > 0`. Action.

"Connection failed." ERROR TEXT (line 604-618): Theme.bad, 12px, leftPadding 16. Shows only when `netItem.expanded && page.connectFailed`; animates height 0 ⇄ implicitHeight + opacity, `visible: height > 0.5`, clip true.
PROCESS: rescanProc (line 150-153) — `nmcli dev wifi rescan`.
PROCESS: secProc (line 155-172) — `nmcli -t -f SSID,SECURITY dev wifi list`, StdioCollector parses into `securityMap`. Supplies the Secured/Open ground truth the Quickshell service does not expose.
PROCESS: profProc (line 174-189) — `nmcli -t -f NAME,TYPE connection show`, filtered to `802-11-wireless`, builds the `knownProfiles` set. Supplies the "Saved" ground truth.

PROCESS: connProc (line 191-215) — `nmcli --ask dev wifi connect <ssid>` with `stdinEnabled: true`; `onStarted` writes `pendingPw + "\n"` then immediately blanks pendingPw. On exit 0: collapse row, clear draft, refresh. On nonzero: set connectFailed and fire cleanupProc.
PROCESS: cleanupProc (line 220-223) — `nmcli connection delete id <ssid>`, fired only when a failed attempt was against a NOT-previously-known SSID. `onExited: page.refresh()`.
BINDING: `wifiDev.scannerEnabled` = `page.active && page.wifiOn`, `when: page.wifiDev !== null` (line 137-142). Drives continuous NM scanning for the page's lifetime.
TIMER: secRefresh (line 227-231) — 1200ms debounce; `onNetsChanged` restarts it, and it re-runs secProc so security data tracks the churning network list.
`refresh()` (line 58-61) — fan-out that re-runs secProc + profProc; called on Component.onCompleted, after connect, after cleanup.
`splitTerse()` (line 65-71) — bespoke parser: walks a `nmcli -t` line backwards to the last UNESCAPED colon, unescapes `\:` in the head. Exists because SSIDs may contain colons.
LAYOUT: content column capped at `colMax: 640` (line 51, applied line 240 as `width: Math.min(parent.width, page.colMax)`) — the page is left-aligned inside a wider hub pane, not stretched.
PluginSettingsForm.qml: NO HARDCODED SETTINGS. This file is a generic renderer, not a settings page. Every visible control is generated at runtime from `form.schema`, an injected property fed by `page.sel.manifest.metadata.settings` (AddonsPage.qml:405). There is no `defaults` literal, no QtObject draft, no tabs, no fixed Repeater model, and no literal config key in the file. The settings inventory for this surface lives in each plugin's manifest.json, not here. The rewrite contract below is the type→control mapping + coercion rules.
Repeater (line 49-103) over `form.schema` — ordered field list. Per-field schema shape: { key, type, label, default, options, min, max, step, decimals, group, placeholder }.

Loader type switch (line 91-99): "choice"→cChoice, "toggle"→cToggle, "slider"→cSlider, "image"→cImage, default→cText. The `default` arm is load-bearing: `text` AND every unrecognized/unknown type falls through to the text field. Must not become an exhaustive/strict switch.

Group section header (line 64-87): mono caps + hairline rule. Rendered once per group, gated on `startsGroup` = (index === 0 || schema[index-1].group !== this.group). Hidden when group is empty string. Theme.dim, Theme.mono, pixelSize 11, DemiBold, letterSpacing 2; hairline Rectangle height 1, Theme.lineSoft, leftMargin 14.

cChoice → Dropdown: label = field.label || field.key; options = field.options mapped {value→key, label→label} via _choices(); current = String(_val(field)) (stringified compare); onChosen(key) → _set(field.key, key).
cToggle → ToggleRow: label = field.label || field.key; checked = (_val === true || _val === "true") — accepts the string "true"; onToggled(v) → _set(field.key, v) writes a real boolean.

cSlider → SliderRow: from = field.min ?? 0; to = field.max ?? 1; step = field.step ?? 0.01; decimals = field.decimals ?? 2; value = Number(_val(field)); onModified(v) → _set(field.key, field.decimals === 0 ? Math.round(v) : v). All four fallbacks use `!== undefined`, not `||`.

cText (line 142-195) — bespoke inline `component`, no shared control exists. Label Text (Theme.cream, font 14, Medium, ElideRight, width = parent.width - box.width - 14) + 220x30 Rectangle (Theme.radius, Theme.surfaceLo) wrapping a TextInput (leftMargin/rightMargin 12, AlignVCenter, Theme.bright, font 13, clip, selectByMouse). Border animates Theme.line→Theme.ember on activeFocus over Theme.quick. Commits on `onEditingFinished` only (focus-out/Enter), NOT per keystroke. Inline placeholder Text (Theme.faint) visible only when text empty AND not focused.

cImage (line 198-259) — bespoke inline `component` opening the system file chooser (XDG portal). 220x30 tap target; label "Choose image…" (Theme.faint) when unset, else basename via `cur.replace(/^.*\//, "")` with ElideLeft (Theme.bright). Icon name "image" size 14. HoverHandler sets PointingHandCursor and swaps fill Theme.surfaceLo→Theme.surface + border Theme.line→Theme.ember, both animated over Theme.quick. TapHandler opens the dialog.

FileDialog (line 252-257), one instance per image field: title "Choose an image"; nameFilters exactly ["Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp *.gif *.bmp)", "All files (*)"]; onAccepted writes `"" + imgDlg.selectedFile` — a file:// URL string, not a plain path.

Live local value mirror: `_local` deep-copied from `values` via JSON.parse(JSON.stringify()) on BOTH onValuesChanged and Component.onCompleted. _val(field) reads _local[key] if !== undefined, else field.default. _set() clones _local, mutates, reassigns (forces binding re-eval), then emits changed(key, value). This exists so edits render without a host round-trip.

Persistence is the host's job, not this file's: `changed(key, value)` → AddonsPage.setSetting() → spawns `ryoku-plugins-place <id> settings '{"key":value}'` → merges into plugins.json. The shell watches plugins.json and retunes the desktop live.

Sibling empty-state owned by the host (AddonsPage.qml:411-417): "This add-on has no configurable settings." shown when metadata.settings is absent/empty; the form itself is `visible: schema.length > 0`. A rewrite must keep both gates agreeing.
KeybindsPage.qml: KeybindsPage.qml — Segmented tab switcher (id: tabs), anchored top-left, model [{all, "Shortcuts"}, {custom, "Custom"}], bound to page.tab via current/onSelected. Sliding selection pill, fixed segW 86, implicitHeight 34. Navigation, not a setting; page.tab is transient and not persisted.
KeybindsPage.qml — Loader (id: loader) filling below the tabs (topMargin 18), sourceComponent = legendComp when tab==="all" else customComp. Destroys/recreates the subtree on every tab switch.
KeybindsPage.qml — fade-in NumberAnimation (id: fade) targeting loader.item.opacity, 0 -> 1, duration Theme.medium, easing Theme.ease, restarted in onLoaded. Purely presentational.

KeybindsPage.qml — `property var categories: []`, injected from Hub.qml (`KeybindsPage { categories: hub.keybindsModel }`) and forwarded to BOTH child components. Sourced from `ryoku-hub keybinds` (Hub.qml:112-119).

KeybindLegend.qml — the entire Shortcuts tab: READ-ONLY Flickable legend of every shipped desktop bind. No settings whatsoever. Repeater over categories -> KeybindGroup. contentHeight from col.implicitHeight, StopAtBounds, clip.

KeybindLegend.qml — bespoke ScrollBar (policy AsNeeded, width 7, 4px radius pill, Theme.line, opacity 0.4 idle / 0.7 hovered / 0.9 pressed with a Theme.quick Behavior). Repeated near-identically in KeybindsEditor.qml (minus the Behavior).

KeybindLegend.qml — footer explainer Text: "Read live from Ryoku's binds plus your Hub custom shortcuts. Binds added by hand in ~/.config/hypr/user.lua don't appear here and aren't conflict-checked, so add custom shortcuts in the Custom tab." (Theme.faint, 12px, lineHeight 1.3)

KeybindGroup.qml — per-category header: ember uppercase mono label (11px, letterSpacing 1.5) + trailing hairline rule, rows split by Theme.lineSoft dividers (visible only when index>0). Has a `tagged` mode that surfaces modelData.cat — used by SearchResults.qml, never by this page.

KeybindRow.qml + KeyCap.qml — one legend line: description left (Theme.subtle 13px, elide right), optional dim mono category tag, keycaps right-aligned joined by a faint "+" separator. Fixed height 44 as instantiated by KeybindGroup.

KeybindsEditor.qml — intro explainer Text (Theme.dim 12px) telling users to add binds here rather than in ~/.config/hypr/user.lua, and to write combos Hyprland-style ("SUPER + J", "SUPER + SHIFT + Return").
KeybindsEditor.qml — "Add shortcut" HubButton (icon "plus") -> page.add(), appends a blank row. ACTION.

KeybindsEditor.qml — per-row delete control (id: delBtn): 26x26 Item with a "trash" Icon (size 15), tint Theme.faint -> Theme.bad on hover, HoverHandler with PointingHandCursor, TapHandler -> page.remove(index). ACTION.
KeybindsEditor.qml — empty state Text "No custom shortcuts yet." (visible when store.keybinds.length === 0).
KeybindsEditor.qml — action bar (id: bar, height 60, bottom-anchored): background and border tint to ember-at-0.08/0.4 alpha when store.dirty, with Theme.medium ColorAnimation Behaviors.

KeybindsEditor.qml — action-bar status dot (9px) + status text. THREE mutually exclusive states: conflictCount>0 -> Theme.gold + "<N> conflict with a shipped or duplicate combo"; store.dirty -> Theme.ember + "Unsaved shortcuts"; else Theme.ok/Theme.dim + "Saved". READOUT, not a setting.
KeybindsEditor.qml — "Clear all" HubButton (icon "refresh") -> store.editList("keybinds", []). ACTION. Always enabled, no confirmation, wipes every custom bind.

KeybindsEditor.qml — "Revert" HubButton (icon "close", enabled only when store.dirty) -> store.revert(): re-adopts committed state AND shells out to `ryoku-hub hypr restore` (full compositor reload). ACTION.

KeybindsEditor.qml — "Save" HubButton (icon "check", primary: true, enabled only when store.dirty) -> store.save(): runs `ryoku-hub hypr save <full-doc-json>`, regenerates settings.lua and reloads. ACTION.
KeybindsEditor.qml — conflict highlighting: row Rectangle border and the keys-field border switch Theme.line -> Theme.gold whenever rowConflict(index) !== "". Derived visual state.

KeybindsEditor.qml — `HyprStore { id: store }` instance: loads the whole Hyprland override doc via `ryoku-hub hypr get` + `ryoku-hub hypr defaults` at construction, owns dirty/ready/save/revert. Infrastructure, not a setting.
BluetoothTab.qml: HEADER BAND (Item id: header, height 48, anchored top/left/right) — left Row (spacing 12) with: (a) 24x24 Bluetooth rune Shape, CurveRenderer, ShapePath strokeWidth 1.8, fillColor transparent, RoundCap/RoundJoin, PathSvg path "M6.5 6.5l11 11L12 23V1l5.5 5.5L6.5 17.5", strokeColor Theme.ember when adapterOn else Theme.dim; (b) static Text "BLUETOOTH", Theme.dim, Theme.mono, 12px, DemiBold, letterSpacing 2.

LIVE DEVICE-COUNT READOUT (header, Theme.faint, Theme.font 12px Medium) — visible only when page.adapterOn. Exact four-branch copy: if devices.length === 0 → "Scanning…" when discovering else "No devices yet"; else if connectedCount > 0 → "<connectedCount> connected · <known> known"; else → "<known> known". connectedCount is computed by looping page.devices counting d.connected.

SCAN PILL (action/stateful toggle, bespoke Rectangle — NOT a ToggleRow/Segmented) — visible only when page.adapterOn; height 30, radius height/2, width scanLbl.implicitWidth + 28. Label "Scanning…" while discovering else "Scan". Fill: rgba(242/255, 86/255, 35/255, 0.14) while discovering, Theme.keyTop on hover, else transparent; border 1px Theme.ember while discovering or hovered, else Theme.line; text Theme.ember / Theme.bright(hover) / Theme.cream; Theme.quick ColorAnimation on color and border.color. HoverHandler PointingHandCursor + TapHandler: flips page.adapter.discovering, then scanTimer.restart() when turning on or scanTimer.stop() when turning off.

OFF / EMPTY PLACEHOLDER COLUMN (anchors.centerIn body, spacing 10) — visible when !hasAdapter || !adapterOn || devices.length === 0. Primary line (Theme.dim, 15px Medium), exact four-branch copy: "Bluetooth isn't available." / "Bluetooth is blocked." / "Bluetooth is off." / ("Scanning…" when discovering else "No devices yet.").

PLACEHOLDER SUBTITLE LINE (Theme.faint, 12px Medium) — visible when !hasAdapter || !adapterOn || (!discovering && devices.length === 0). Exact four-branch copy: "The bluetooth service (bluez) isn't running." / "The radio is off at the hardware level (rfkill); the toggle unblocks it." / "Turn the adapter on to see nearby and paired devices." / "Hit Scan to discover nearby devices."

START SERVICE PILL (action button) — visible only when !page.hasAdapter (org.bluez missing entirely); height 32, radius height/2, width svcLbl.implicitWidth + 32. Label "Starting…" while svcProc.running else "Start service". Fill Theme.keyTop on hover when not running else transparent; border Theme.ember when running or hovered else Theme.line. TapHandler → page.startService() → svcProc: `pkexec systemctl enable --now bluetooth.service` (raises the polkit prompt via hyprpolkitagent; enable --now so it survives the next boot).

SERVICE ERROR LINE — Text, Theme.ember 12px Medium, visible when page.serviceError.length > 0; set to exactly "Could not start the bluetooth service." on svcProc non-zero exit, auto-cleared by svcErrTimer after 6000ms.

DEVICE LIST FLICKABLE (id: devFlick) — visible when adapterOn && devices.length > 0; width Math.min(parent.width - 48, 640), horizontally centred, contentHeight devCol.implicitHeight + 8, clip true, boundsBehavior StopAtBounds. Custom vertical ScrollBar: policy AsNeeded, width 7, contentItem Rectangle implicitWidth 4, radius Theme.radius, color Theme.line, opacity 0.9 pressed / 0.7 hovered / 0.4 idle with Theme.quick NumberAnimation.

DEVICE ROW REPEATER (model: page.devicesSorted — a LIVE BlueZ device list, NOT a settings model; column spacing 8, per-delegate spacing 4). Custom sort: rank connected(0) → paired(1) → named(2) → nameless MAC(3), tie-broken by localeCompare of name, so a scan doesn't churn the useful rows.

PER-DEVICE TILE (Rectangle, height 64, radius Theme.radius) — fill Theme.frameBg when connected / Theme.keyTop on hover / Theme.surfaceLo; border Theme.ember when connected / Theme.line on hover / Theme.lineSoft; Theme.quick animations.
